Detecting Deepfakes via Hamiltonian Dynamics

High 2605.04405
Harry Cheng, Ming-Hui Liu, Tianyi Wang, Weili Guan, Liqiang Nie, Mohan Kankanhalli
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用哈密顿动力学将深度伪造检测从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析，提出 HAAD 方法。
🎯研究动机

现有深度伪造检测器需不断重新校准以应对新合成伪影，缺乏通用性；本文从物理启发先验出发，探索自然图像与生成图像在动力学稳定性上的本质差异。

❓解决问题

如何不依赖特定伪造模式，通过动态稳定性分析实现跨数据集的深度伪造检测。

🔎现象分析

自然图像趋于稳定低能平衡态，而生成图像因缺乏结构约束（如几何平滑性）更可能处于不稳定高能态。

🛠️主要方法

将图像潜在流形建模为势能面，利用哈密顿动力学作为稳定性探针：从静止释放潜在状态，通过轨迹统计量（哈密顿作用量和能量耗散）区分真实与伪造图像。

📊实验结果

在挑战性的跨数据集迁移基准上，HAAD 优于评估的现有基线。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于哈密顿动力学的深度伪造检测新范式，从静态模式识别转向动态稳定性分析。
  • 设计哈密顿作用异常检测（HAAD）方法，包括势能面建模、动力学探测和轨迹统计量。
  • 在跨数据集迁移基准上超越现有基线，验证了物理启发先验的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对图像预处理或潜在空间选择敏感。
  • 计算开销可能高于传统静态检测方法。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Driven by the rapid development of generative AI models, deepfake detectors are compelled to undergo periodic recalibration to capture newly developed synthetic artifacts. To break this cycle, we propose a new perspective on deepfake detection: moving from static pattern recognition to dynamical stability analysis. Specifically, our approach is motivated by physics-inspired priors: we hypothesize that natural images, as products of dissipative physical processes, tend to settle near stable, low-energy equilibria. In contrast, generative models optimize for statistical similarity to real images but do not explicitly enforce structural constraints such as geometric smoothness, leaving deepfakes more likely to occupy unstable, high-energy states. To operationalize this, we introduce Hamiltonian Action Anomaly Detection (HAAD), comprising three contributions: \textbf{i)} We model the image latent manifold as a potential energy surface. Under this hypothesis, real images are expected to produce basin-like low-energy responses, whereas fake images are more likely to induce high-potential, high-gradient responses. \textbf{ii)} We employ Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics as a stability probe. By releasing latent states from rest, samples near stable regions remain bounded, while high-gradient samples produce larger trajectory responses. \textbf{iii)} We quantify these dynamic behaviors through two trajectory statistics, \ie, Hamiltonian action and energy dissipation. Extensive experiments show that HAAD outperforms evaluated state-of-the-art baselines on challenging cross-dataset transfer benchmarks, supporting a physics-inspired stability prior for digital forensics.

InterMesh: Explicit Interaction-Aware End-to-End Multi-Person Human Mesh Recovery

High 2605.04554
Kaili Zheng, Kaiwen Wang, Xun Zhu, Chenyi Guo, Ji Wu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：InterMesh 通过显式建模人 - 物交互信息，在多人人体网格恢复中显著提升精度。
🎯研究动机

现有端到端多人人体网格恢复方法隐式建模交互，缺乏对人 - 物、人 - 人交互的显式推理，导致复杂交互场景下姿态和形状估计不准确。

❓解决问题

如何显式地将人 - 环境交互信息融入多人人体网格恢复流程，以提升姿态和形状估计的准确性。

🔎现象分析

基于 DETR 框架的方法通过自注意力隐式捕获交互，但缺乏显式交互推理，在复杂交互场景下性能受限。

🛠️主要方法

提出 InterMesh 框架，利用人 - 物交互检测器提取结构化交互语义，并设计轻量级模块（上下文交互编码器和交互引导精炼器）将其集成到现有 HMR 架构中。

📊实验结果

在 3DPW、MuPoTS、CMU Panoptic、Hi4D 和 CHI3D 数据集上实验，相比 SOTA 方法，在 CMU Panoptic 上 MPJPE 降低 9.9%，在 Hi4D 上降低 8.2%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出显式建模人 - 物交互的端到端多人人体网格恢复框架 InterMesh。
  • 设计轻量级模块 Contextual Interaction Encoder 和 Interaction-Guided Refiner，有效融合交互信息。
  • 在多个数据集上达到 SOTA，尤其在复杂交互场景下显著降低 MPJPE。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖人 - 物交互检测器的质量，可能受限于检测器性能。
  • 未在更多样化的交互场景（如多人 - 多物）中验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Humans constantly interact with their surroundings. Existing end-to-end multi-person human mesh recovery methods, typically based on the DETR framework, capture inter-human relationships through self-attention across all human queries. However, these approaches model interactions only implicitly and lack explicit reasoning about how humans interact with objects and with each other. In this paper, we propose InterMesh, a simple yet effective framework that explicitly incorporates human-environment interaction information into human mesh recovery pipeline. By leveraging a human-object interaction detector, InterMesh enriches query representations with structured interaction semantics, enabling more accurate pose and shape estimation. We design lightweight modules, Contextual Interaction Encoder and Interaction-Guided Refiner, to integrate these features into existing HMR architectures with minimal overhead. We validate our approach through extensive experiments on 3DPW, MuPoTS, CMU Panoptic, Hi4D, and CHI3D datasets, demonstrating remarkable improvements over state-of-the-art methods. Notably, InterMesh reduces MPJPE by 9.9% on CMU Panoptic and 8.2% on Hi4D, highlighting its effectiveness in scenarios with complex human-object and inter-human interactions.

Open-Source Image Editing Models Are Zero-Shot Vision Learners

High 2605.04566
Wei Liu, Jiaxin Lin, Rui Chen
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：开源图像编辑模型无需微调即可零样本解决密集视觉预测任务，性能可匹敌甚至超越专用模型。
🎯研究动机

现有研究表明大型生成模型可解决未显式训练的视觉任务，但证据依赖闭源模型或需任务特定微调，缺乏对开源图像编辑模型零样本能力的系统评估。

❓解决问题

验证开源图像编辑模型是否天然具备零样本视觉理解能力，并探究该能力是否为图像编辑预训练涌现特性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

对三个开源图像编辑模型（Qwen-Image-Edit、FireRed-Image-Edit、LongCat-Image-Edit）在密集视觉预测任务上进行零样本评估，包括单目深度估计、表面法线估计和语义分割，无需任何微调。

📊实验结果

在 NYUv2 和 DIODE 上进行深度估计，NYUv2 上进行表面法线估计，Cityscapes 上进行语义分割。FireRed-Image-Edit 在 NYUv2 表面法线达到平均角度误差 17.69°，优于微调 Marigold（20.86°）并匹配 Vision Banana（17.78°）。LongCat-Image-Edit 在 NYUv2 深度估计上δ1=0.822，Qwen-Image-Edit 在 DIODE 室内δ1=0.868。Cityscapes 语义分割上 Qwen-Image-Edit 达到 25.7 mIoU（19 类）和 49.5 mIoU（7 类）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统评估开源图像编辑模型的零样本视觉能力，覆盖几何与语义场景理解。
  • 发现 FireRed-Image-Edit 在表面法线估计上超越微调模型 Marigold，匹配指令调优模型 Vision Banana。
  • 通过对比三个独立训练的编辑器，验证零样本视觉能力是图像编辑预训练的涌现特性。
  • 公开代码、评估脚本和所有结果，作为可复现基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了三个开源模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
  • 零样本性能仍低于最先进的专用模型，实际应用可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent studies have shown that large generative models can solve vision tasks they were not explicitly trained for. However, existing evidence relies on closed-source models~(Veo~3, Nano Banana Pro) or requires task-specific instruction tuning, leaving open whether publicly available image-editing models possess zero-shot vision abilities out of the box. We conduct a systematic evaluation of three open-source image-editing models -- Qwen-Image-Edit, FireRed-Image-Edit, and LongCat-Image-Edit -- on dense visual prediction tasks \emph{without any fine-tuning}. We benchmark monocular depth estimation on NYUv2 and DIODE, surface normal estimation on NYUv2, and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes, covering both geometric and semantic scene understanding. Results show that open-source image-editing models exhibit non-trivial zero-shot visual understanding. On NYUv2 surface normals, FireRed-Image-Edit achieves a mean angular error of $17.69^\circ$, surpassing the fine-tuned Marigold ($20.86^\circ$) and matching the instruction-tuned Vision Banana ($17.78^\circ$) without any task-specific training. On NYUv2 depth estimation, LongCat-Image-Edit obtains $\delta_1{=}0.822$ with affine alignment, and Qwen-Image-Edit leads on DIODE Indoor ($\delta_1{=}0.868$). On Cityscapes semantic segmentation, Qwen-Image-Edit reaches 25.7 mIoU at the 19-class level and 49.5 mIoU at a coarser 7-category level. By comparing three independently trained editors, we test whether zero-shot vision ability is an emergent property of image-editing pretraining rather than a model-specific artifact. Code, evaluation scripts, and all results are publicly released to serve as a reproducible baseline for future work.

GTF: Omnidirectional EPI Transformer for Light Field Super-Resolution

High 2605.04581
Kunyu Li, Fei Wang, Lichao Zhang, Junjie Liu, Bihong Li
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出全向 EPI Transformer GTF，显式建模多方向极平面图像以提升光场超分辨率性能。
🎯研究动机

现有基于 Transformer 的光场超分辨率方法主要关注水平和垂直极平面图像，忽略了 45°和 135°对角线极平面几何信息，限制了性能提升。

❓解决问题

如何显式建模多方向（水平、垂直、45°、135°）极平面图像，以更充分利用光场几何结构实现高质量超分辨率。

🔎现象分析

对角线极平面图像包含额外的视差信息，现有方法未充分利用；轻量级模型在效率约束下仍能保持高精度。

🛠️主要方法

提出全向 EPI Transformer（GTF），包含方向性 EPI 处理、MacPI 先验注入、自适应方向融合和拓扑保持前馈网络，统一重建框架。

📊实验结果

在五个标准光场超分辨率基准（包含真实和合成场景）上，GTF 达到 32.78 dB（无推理增强），使用 EPSW 和测试时增强进一步提升。NTIRE 2026 挑战赛中，Track 1 和 Track 3 排名第 3，Track 2 排名第 4。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次在 Transformer 中显式建模水平、垂直、45°和 135°四个方向的极平面图像。
  • 提出 MacPI 先验注入和自适应方向融合模块，有效利用多方向几何信息。
  • 轻量级 GTF-Tiny 在 0.915M 参数下达到 32.57 dB，适用于效率赛道。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对极端视差或噪声场景鲁棒性不足。
  • 轻量级模型在极低计算预算下性能可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Light field (LF) image super-resolution benefits from Epipolar Plane Images (EPIs), whose line slopes explicitly encode disparity. However, existing Transformer-based LF SR methods mainly attend to horizontal and vertical EPIs, leaving diagonal epipolar geometry underexplored. We present GTF, an omnidirectional EPI Transformer that explicitly models horizontal, vertical, 45-degree, and 135-degree EPIs within a unified reconstruction framework. GTF combines directional EPI processing, MacPI-based prior injection, adaptive directional fusion, and a topology-preserving feed-forward network to better exploit LF geometry. For the NTIRE 2026 fidelity tracks, we use GTF as the main model, while a lightweight GTF-Tiny variant targets the efficiency track. On five standard LF SR benchmarks covering both real-captured and synthetic scenes, GTF reaches 32.78 dB without inference-time enhancement, and stronger inference settings with EPSW and test-time augmentation further improve performance. Under the NTIRE 2026 efficiency constraint, GTF-Tiny attains 32.57 dB with only 0.915M parameters and 19.81 GFLOPs. In the NTIRE 2026 Light Field Image Super-Resolution Challenge, our submissions rank 3rd on Track 1 and Track 3 and 4th on Track 2. Architecture-evolution, channel-width, and inference analyses further support the effectiveness of diagonal EPI modeling, directional fusion, and the lightweight design.

DiCLIP: Diffusion Model Enhances CLIP's Dense Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation

High 2605.04593
Zhiwei Yang, Pengfei Song, Yucong Meng, Kexue Fu, Shuo Wang, Zhijian Song
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用扩散模型增强 CLIP 的密集知识，提升弱监督语义分割性能。
🎯研究动机

弱监督语义分割依赖图像级标签，现有方法使用 CLIP 生成 CAM，但 CLIP 在视觉和文本模态上的密集知识有限，导致 CAM 生成次优。

❓解决问题

如何增强 CLIP 在视觉和文本模态上的密集知识，以生成更准确的 CAM。

🔎现象分析

CLIP 的注意力存在过平滑问题，且单一文本模态不足以覆盖视觉类别的多样性。

🛠️主要方法

提出 DiCLIP 框架，包含视觉相关性增强（VCE）和文本语义增强（TSA）模块：VCE 利用扩散模型的空间一致性缓解 CLIP 注意力的过平滑，TSA 通过扩散模型维护动态键值缓存，将 CAM 生成从补丁 - 文本匹配转变为视觉知识检索。

📊实验结果

在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上评估，优于现有方法，且训练成本更低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 DiCLIP 框架，利用扩散模型增强 CLIP 的密集知识，提升 WSSS 性能。
  • 设计 VCE 和 TSA 模块，分别改善视觉特征的空间分辨率和文本语义的多样性。
  • 在 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 上达到 SOTA，并显著降低训练成本。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖扩散模型的预训练质量。
  • 可能对复杂场景的泛化性有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) with image-level labels typically leverages Class Activation Maps (CAMs) to achieve pixel-level predictions. Recently, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has been introduced to generate CAMs in WSSS. However, previous WSSS methods solely adopt CLIP's vision-language paired property for dense localization, neglecting its inherently limited dense knowledge across both visual and text modalities, which renders CAM generation suboptimal. In this work, we propose DiCLIP, a novel WSSS framework that leverages the generative diffusion model to enhance CLIP's dense knowledge across two modalities. Specifically, Visual Correlation Enhancement (VCE) and Text Semantic Augmentation (TSA) modules are proposed for dense prediction enhancement. To improve the spatial awareness of visual features, our VCE module utilizes diffusion's reliable spatial consistency to mitigate the over-smoothing issue in CLIP's attention. It designs the Attention Clustering Refinement (ACR) module to reliably extract diverse correlation maps from the diffusion model. The correlation maps act as a diversity bias for CLIP's self-attention, recursively pushing its visual features towards a more discriminative dense distribution. To augment the semantics of text embeddings, our TSA module argues that a single text modality is insufficient to encompass the variability of visual categories. Thus, we leverage diffusion's generative power to maintain a dynamic key-value cache model, shifting CAM generation from a patch-text matching mechanism to a novel visual knowledge retrieval paradigm. With these enhancements, DiCLIP not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods on PASCAL VOC and MS COCO but also significantly reduces training costs. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

Anny-Fit: All-Age Human Mesh Recovery

High 2605.04728
Laura Bravo-Sánchez, Matthieu Armando, Romain Brégier, Grégory Rogez, Serena Yeung-Levy, Fabien Baradel
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：Anny-Fit 通过联合优化多人体、利用多模态专家知识（包括 VLM 语义属性），实现了全年龄段 3D 人体网格恢复，显著提升深度排序和形状估计。
🎯研究动机

现有 3D 人体网格恢复方法大多假设成人主体且独立优化每个人，无法处理真实世界中全年龄段场景下身体比例和深度的联合歧义。

❓解决问题

从单张图像中恢复全年龄段、多人的 3D 人体姿态和形状，并解决深度 - 尺度歧义。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Anny-Fit，一个多人在相机空间联合优化框架，利用度量深度图、实例分割、2D 关键点和 VLM 导出的年龄 / 性别等语义属性作为专家知识，共同约束优化过程。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上，Anny-Fit 在 2D 重投影精度（+13 到 16）、相对深度排序（+6 到 7）、3D 估计误差（-9 到 -29）和形状估计（+25 到 +82）上均有一致提升。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个全年龄段多人体网格恢复的联合优化框架 Anny-Fit，直接相机坐标系优化保证全局空间一致性。
  • 利用多种专家知识（包括 VLM 语义属性）解决深度 - 尺度歧义，显著提升 2D 重投影精度、相对深度排序、3D 估计和形状估计。
  • 展示 VLM 语义知识可通过 Anny-Fit 生成的伪真值蒸馏到 HMR 模型中，实现零样本适应全年龄段。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖多个 off-the-shelf 网络，可能引入累积误差。
  • VLM 语义属性可能受限于训练数据分布，对罕见年龄或性别组合效果未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recovering 3D human pose and shape from a single image remains a cornerstone of human-centric vision, yet most methods assume adult subjects and optimize each person independently. These assumptions fail in real-world, all-age scenes, where body proportions and depth must be resolved jointly. We introduce Anny-Fit, a multi-person, camera-space optimization framework for all-age 3D human mesh recovery (HMR). Unlike existing per-person fitting methods, Anny-Fit jointly optimizes all individuals directly in the camera coordinate system, enforcing global spatial consistency. At the core of our approach is the use of multiple forms of expert knowledge -- including metric depth maps, instance segmentation, 2D keypoints, and, VLM-derived semantic attributes such as age and gender -- each obtained from dedicated off-the-shelf networks. These complementary signals jointly guide the optimization, constraining the depth-scale ambiguity characteristic of all-age scenes. Across diverse datasets, Anny-Fit consistently improves 2D reprojection accuracy (+13 to 16), relative depth ordering (+6 to 7), 3D estimation error (-9 to -29) and shape estimation (+25 to +82), producing more coherent scenes. Finally, we show that VLM-based semantic knowledge can be distilled into an HMR model via the pseudo-ground-truth annotations produced by Anny-Fit on training data, enabling it to learn semantically meaningful shape parameters while improving HMR performance. Our approach bridges adult-only and all-age modeling by enabling zero-shot adaptation of adult-trained HMR pipelines to the full age spectrum without retraining. Code is publicly available at this https URL .

Gaze4HRI: Zero-shot Benchmarking Gaze Estimation Neural-Networks for Human-Robot Interaction

High 2605.04770
Berk Sezer, Ali Görkem Küçük, Erol Şahin, Sinan Kalkan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 Gaze4HRI 基准，发现所有零样本 3D 视线估计方法在 HRI 条件下均存在失败点，且数据多样性比复杂架构更重要。
🎯研究动机

零样本 3D 视线估计在 HRI 中成本低，但现有基准忽略动态视角和移动目标等关键条件，跨数据集评估存在复杂度差距，无法评估真实鲁棒性。

❓解决问题

缺乏针对 HRI 关键变量（光照、头 - 视线冲突、相机和目标运动）的零样本视线估计基准，且现有方法在复杂 HRI 条件下的鲁棒性未知。

🔎现象分析

所有评估方法在至少一种条件下失败，其中陡峭向下视线是通用失败点；PureGaze 在 ETH-X-Gaze 上训练后在其他条件下保持鲁棒性。

🛠️主要方法

构建包含 50+ 受试者、3000+ 视频、600000+ 帧的大规模数据集 Gaze4HRI，系统评估多种 SOTA 方法在光照、头 - 视线冲突、相机和目标运动等条件下的表现。

📊实验结果

在 Gaze4HRI 数据集上评估多种 SOTA 方法，包括 PureGaze、ETH-X-Gaze 等，分析不同条件下的性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 Gaze4HRI 基准，覆盖 HRI 关键变量，揭示零样本视线估计的失败模式。
  • 发现数据多样性（如 ETH-X-Gaze）比复杂架构（时空模型、Transformer）对零样本鲁棒性更重要。
  • 验证 PureGaze 的自对抗损失可进一步提升鲁棒性，为实践提供指导。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估零样本设置，未考虑微调或领域适应。
  • 数据集可能未覆盖所有 HRI 场景（如不同机器人平台）。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

While zero-shot appearance-based 3D gaze estimation offers significant cost-efficiency by directly mapping RGB images to gaze vectors, its reliability in Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) settings remains uncertain. Existing benchmarks frequently overlook fundamental HRI conditions, such as dynamic camera viewpoints and moving targets in video. Furthermore, current cross-dataset evaluations often suffer from a complexity gap, where methods trained on diverse datasets are tested on significantly smaller and less varied sets, failing to assess true robustness. To bridge these gaps, we introduce Gaze4HRI, a large-scale dataset (50+ subjects, 3,000+ videos, 600,000+ frames) designed to evaluate state-of-the-art performance against critical HRI variables: illumination, head-gaze conflict, as well as the motion of camera and gaze target in video. Our benchmark reveals that all evaluated methods fail in at least one condition, identifying steeply-downward gaze as a universal failure point. Notably, PureGaze trained on the ETH-X-Gaze dataset uniquely maintains resilience across all other conditions. These results challenge the recent focus in the literature on complex spatial-temporal modeling and Transformer-based architectures. Instead, our findings suggest that extensive data diversity, as exemplified by the ETH-X-Gaze dataset, serves as the primary driver of zero-shot robustness in unconstrained environments, while resilience-enhancing frameworks, such as PureGaze's self-adversarial loss for gaze feature purification, provide a substantial further improvement. Ultimately, this study establishes a rigorous benchmark that provides practical guidelines for practitioners as well as reshaping future research. The dataset and codes are available at this https URL .

ScriptHOI: Learning Scripted State Transitions for Open-Vocabulary Human-Object Interaction Detection

High 2605.05057
Minh Anh Nguyen, Quang Huy Tran, Bao Ngoc Le, SuiYang Guang, Tuan Kiet Pham, Linh Chi Vo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：ScriptHOI 将交互短语分解为脚本化状态转换，通过视觉状态标记和槽匹配校准 HOI 检测，提升开放词汇场景下的交互识别能力。
🎯研究动机

现有开放词汇 HOI 检测器依赖物体功能与短语共现，导致预测缺乏对交互细节的验证，易产生假阳性。

❓解决问题

如何让模型在开放词汇 HOI 检测中验证交互的完整证据链，避免仅凭物体功能推断交互。

🔎现象分析

模型预测常被物体功能（如刀和蛋糕导致预测切蛋糕）和短语共现主导，而忽略手、工具、目标、接触模式和物体状态是否共同支持动作。

🛠️主要方法

将每个交互短语分解为身体角色、接触、几何、功能、运动和物体状态六个槽位；视觉状态分词器提取状态标记；槽匹配器计算脚本覆盖度和冲突度以校准 logits；引入区间部分标签学习和反事实脚本对比损失。

📊实验结果

在 HICO-DET、V-COCO 和开放词汇 HOI 分割上实验，ScriptHOI 提升了罕见和未见交互的识别，并显著减少了功能冲突假阳性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出脚本化状态转换框架 ScriptHOI，将交互短语分解为结构化槽位，显式建模交互证据链。
  • 引入区间部分标签学习，避免抑制未标注的有效交互。
  • 设计反事实脚本对比损失，减少物体功能捷径。
⚠️方法局限
  • 脚本槽位的定义可能依赖先验知识，泛化到新交互需扩展槽位。
  • 视觉状态分词器的性能可能受限于检测质量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires recognizing interaction phrases that may not appear as annotated categories during training. Recent vision-language HOI detectors improve semantic transfer by matching human-object features with text embeddings, but their predictions are often dominated by object affordance and phrase-level co-occurrence. As a result, a model may predict \textit{cut cake} from the presence of a knife and a cake without verifying whether the hand, tool, target, contact pattern, and object state jointly support the action. We propose \textbf{ScriptHOI}, a structured framework that represents each interaction phrase as a soft scripted state transition. Rather than treating a phrase as a single class token, ScriptHOI decomposes it into body-role, contact, geometry, affordance, motion, and object-state slots. A visual state tokenizer parses each detected human-object pair into corresponding state tokens, and a slot-wise matcher estimates both script coverage and script conflict. These two quantities calibrate HOI logits, expose missing visual evidence, and provide training constraints for incomplete annotations. To avoid suppressing valid but unannotated interactions, we further introduce interval partial-label learning, which constrains unannotated candidates with script-derived lower and upper probability bounds instead of assigning closed-world negatives. A counterfactual script contrast loss swaps individual script slots to discourage object-only shortcuts. Experiments on HICO-DET, V-COCO, and open-vocabulary HOI splits show that ScriptHOI improves rare and unseen interaction recognition while substantially reducing affordance-conflict false positives.

FlowDIS: Language-Guided Dichotomous Image Segmentation with Flow Matching

High 2605.05077
Andranik Sargsyan, Shant Navasardyan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：FlowDIS 利用流匹配框架实现语言引导的二分图像分割，显著提升细节保留和语义结构捕获能力。
🎯研究动机

现有二分图像分割方法难以保留细粒度细节或充分捕获前景的语义结构，且缺乏语言引导的灵活性，限制了在图像编辑、自动驾驶等应用中的表现。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种既能精确分割像素级细节、又能通过文本提示灵活控制的分割方法。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于流匹配框架，学习时间依赖的向量场将图像分布传输到掩码分布，并可选地以文本提示为条件；提出位置感知实例配对训练策略增强可控性。

📊实验结果

在 DIS-TE 测试集上，FlowDIS 相比最佳先前方法在 Fβω 指标上提升 5.5%，MAE 降低 43%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 FlowDIS，首个将流匹配应用于二分图像分割的方法，支持语言引导。
  • 设计位置感知实例配对训练策略，实现精确的像素级对象分割。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量文本提示，弱提示下性能未知。
  • 流匹配推理速度可能较慢，实时性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate image segmentation is essential for modern computer vision applications such as image editing, autonomous driving, and medical image analysis. In recent years, Dichotomous Image Segmentation (DIS) has become a standard task for training and evaluating highly accurate segmentation models. Existing DIS approaches often fail to preserve fine-grained details or fully capture the semantic structure of the foreground. To address these challenges, we present FlowDIS, a novel dichotomous image segmentation method built on the flow matching framework, which learns a time-dependent vector field to transport the image distribution to the corresponding mask distribution, optionally conditioned on a text prompt. Moreover, with our Position-Aware Instance Pairing (PAIP) training strategy, FlowDIS offers strong controllability through text prompts, enabling precise, pixel-level object segmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches both with and without language guidance. Compared with the best prior DIS method, FlowDIS achieves a 5.5% higher $F_{\beta}^{\omega}$ measure and 43% lower MAE ($\mathcal{M}$) on the DIS-TE test set. The code is available at: this https URL

What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression

High 2605.05148
Kedar Tatwawadi, Parisa Rahimzadeh, Zhanghao Sun, Zhiqi Chen, Ziyun Yang, Sanjay Nair, Divija Hasteer, Oren Rippel
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：通过神经架构搜索和感知优化，实现速度与感知质量俱佳的学习图像编解码器。
🎯研究动机

学习型图像编解码器可针对人类视觉系统优化，但现有方法在感知质量和实际运行速度之间难以兼顾，缺乏实用的感知编解码器。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个同时优化感知质量和运行时效率的实用学习图像编解码器。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

对关键建模选择进行消融研究，并引入性能感知的神经架构搜索，在数百万骨干配置中寻找在目标设备上满足运行时间约束且感知压缩性能最优的模型。

📊实验结果

基于严格的主观用户研究，新编解码器相比 AV1、AV2、VVC、ECM 和 JPEG-AI 节省 2.3-3 倍比特率，相比最佳学习编解码器节省 20-40% 比特率；在 iPhone 17 Pro Max 上，12MP 图像编码 230ms，解码 150ms。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统研究了实用学习图像编解码器的关键建模选择，包括若干新技术。
  • 提出性能感知的神经架构搜索方法，平衡运行时间和感知质量。
  • 构建的新编解码器在主观测试中比特率节省显著，且移动端推理速度快于多数基于 ML 的编解码器在 V100 GPU 上的速度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定移动设备（iPhone 17 Pro Max）进行优化，泛化性未知。
  • 神经架构搜索的计算成本可能较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

One of the major differentiators unlocked by learned codecs relative to their hard-coded traditional counterparts is their ability to be optimized directly to appeal to the human visual system. Despite this potential, a perceptual yet practical image codec is yet to be proposed. In this work, we aim to close this gap. We conduct a comprehensive study of the key modeling choices that govern the design of a practical learned image codec, jointly optimized for perceptual quality and runtime -- including within the ablations several novel techniques. We then perform performance-aware neural architecture search over millions of backbone configurations to identify models that achieve the target on-device runtime while maximizing compression performance as captured by perceptual metrics. We combine the various optimizations to construct a new codec that achieves a significantly improved tradeoff between speed and perceptual quality. Based on rigorous subjective user studies, it provides 2.3-3x bitrate savings against AV1, AV2, VVC, ECM and JPEG-AI, and 20-40% bitrate savings against the best learned codec alternatives. At the same time, on an iPhone 17 Pro Max, it encodes 12MP images as fast as 230ms, and decodes them in 150ms -- faster than most top ML-based codecs run on a V100 GPU.

Optimize-at-Capture: Highly-adaptive Exposure Controlling for In-Vehicle Non-contact Heart-rate Monitoring

Medium 2605.04397
Jieying Wang, Xinqi Cai, Caifeng Shan, Wenjin Wang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种针对车载非接触心率监测的曝光控制框架，通过预测皮肤反射调整曝光参数，显著提升 rPPG 在动态光照下的性能。
🎯研究动机

车载非接触心率监测（rPPG）在智能驾驶中潜力巨大，但动态光照变化严重降低其性能。现有系统依赖固定曝光或相机内置自动曝光，无法在快速变化的驾驶光照下保持面部亮度稳定，导致 rPPG 信号质量差。

❓解决问题

解决车载 rPPG 在高度动态光照下因缺乏自适应曝光控制而导致的心率监测精度低和成功率低的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种高度自适应的曝光控制框架，基于历史皮肤反射的预测模型主动调整曝光参数，使皮肤感兴趣区域（ROI）始终处于 rPPG 信号提取的最佳动态范围内。

📊实验结果

在真实驾驶场景下进行实验，与固定曝光和标准自动曝光对比。结果显示，所提方法将平均绝对误差（MAE）从 14.1 bpm 降至 7.79 bpm（降低 6.31 bpm），成功率从 24.9% 提升至 57.2%（提升 32.3 个百分点，p<0.001），在低光（雨天）和高眩光（晴天）条件下均有效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种针对 rPPG 优化的自适应曝光控制框架，优于固定曝光和标准自动曝光。
  • 发布 ExpDrive 数据集，包含 48 名受试者在真实驾驶条件下同步的面部视频和参考 ECG 数据。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖历史皮肤反射的预测模型，对初始曝光参数敏感。
  • 数据集规模有限（48 名受试者），泛化性需进一步验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) holds great promise for continuous heart-rate monitoring of drivers in intelligent vehicles. However, its performance is severely degraded by the highly dynamic illumination changes. A critical yet overlooked factor is the lack of exposure controlling during video acquisition -- most existing systems rely on either fixed exposure settings or camera build-in auto-exposure, both of which fail to maintain stable facial brightness under rapidly changing lighting conditions during driving. To address this gap, we propose a highly-adaptive exposure controlling framework that proactively adjusts exposure parameters based on predictive modeling of historical skin reflections. Unlike standard auto-exposure, our method is specifically optimized for rPPG measurement, ensuring the skin region of interest (ROI) remains within the optimal dynamic range for rPPG signal extraction. As an important contribution of this study, we introduce ExpDrive, a public in-vehicle physiological monitoring dataset comprising synchronized facial video and reference ECG from 48 subjects captured under real driving conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms fixed exposure and standard auto-exposure strategies. Specifically, it reduces the Mean Absolute Error (MAE) by 6.31 bpm (from 14.1 to 7.79 bpm) and significantly increases the success rate by 32.3 percentage points (p < 0.001) (from 24.9% to 57.2%) across challenging driving scenarios. Notably, it clearly improved the performance of non-contact heart-rate monitoring in both low-light (rainy) and high-glare (sunny) conditions, validating the efficacy of exposure-aware acquisition design.

A cross-modal network for facial expression recognition

Medium 2605.04439
Chunwei Tian, Jingyuan Xie, Qi Zhang, Chao Li, Wangmeng Zuo, Shichao Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种利用面部对称性和半脸对齐的跨模态网络（CMNet）用于面部表情识别，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

现有基于结构信息的深度神经网络在面部表情识别中常依赖层次信息而非面部属性，导致特征提取不充分且易受干扰。

❓解决问题

如何利用面部对称性和半脸结构信息提取互补特征，并减少生物与结构信息融合的负面影响，以提高表情识别的稳定性和准确性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出跨模态网络 CMNet，包含：1）基于面部对称性从全脸、左半脸和右半脸学习互补特征；2）显著面部信息精炼模块提取显著表情信息，提高分类器稳定性；3）半脸对齐优化机制减少对单侧特征的依赖。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上实验，CMNet 优于 SCN 和 LAENet-SA 等方法。摘要未提供具体数据集名称和数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 CMNet，利用面部对称性和半脸结构信息进行表情识别。
  • 设计显著面部信息精炼模块和半脸对齐优化机制，提升特征融合稳定性和分类性能。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对遮挡或非正面人脸鲁棒性不足。
  • 计算复杂度可能较高，因涉及多分支网络。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep neural networks enriched with structural information have been widely employed for facial expression recognition tasks. However, these methods often depend on hierarchical information rather than face property to finish expression recognition. In this paper, we propose a cross-modal network with strong biological and structural information for facial expression recognition (CMNet). CMNet can respectively learn expression information via face symmetry on a whole face, left and right half faces to extract complementary facial features. To prevent negative effect of biological and structural information fusion, a salient facial information refinement module can obtain salient facial expression information to improve stability of an obtained facial expression classifier. To reduce reliance on unilateral facial features, a half-face alignment optimization mechanism is designed to align obtained expression information of learned left and right half faces. Our experimental results demonstrate that CMNet outperforms several novel methods, i.e., SCN and LAENet-SA for facial expression recognition. Codes can be obtained at this https URL .

LEGO: LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework for Synthetic Image Detection

Medium 2605.04445
Yutong Xiao, Ran Ran, Jiwei Wei, Shuchang Zhou, Ke Liu, Zheng Ziqiang, Caiyan Qin
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 LEGO 框架，用多个 LoRA 模块分别捕获不同生成器的独特伪影，通过 MLP 和注意力融合实现高效合成图像检测。
🎯研究动机

现有合成图像检测方法依赖跨生成器的通用伪影特征，但随着生成器多样性增加，通用特征重叠减少，导致泛化能力下降；而仅关注独特伪影又容易过拟合。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个既能捕获各生成器独特伪影又能避免过拟合的合成图像检测框架。

🔎现象分析

观察到随着生成器多样性增加，不同生成器之间的通用伪影特征重叠逐渐减少，这严重损害了模型泛化能力。

🛠️主要方法

提出 LEGO 框架，核心是使用 MLP 调制多个 LoRA 模块，每个 LoRA 模块预训练于单一生成器数据集以学习其独特伪影，然后通过注意力机制融合特征；训练分两阶段：先单独训练各 LoRA 模块，再训练 MLP 和注意力层。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在少量训练数据下性能优于 SOTA。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 LEGO 框架，通过模块化 LoRA 设计有效捕获生成器特定伪影并避免过拟合。
  • 在少于 30,000 张训练图像、少于 10% 训练数据和仅 5 个 epoch 的条件下，性能显著优于现有 SOTA 方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖预定义的生成器集合，对新生成器需要添加新 LoRA 模块。
  • 两阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid advancement of generative technologies has made synthetic images nearly indistinguishable from real ones, thereby creating an urgent need for robust detectors to counter misinformation. However, existing methods mainly rely on universal artifact features that are shared across multiple generators. We observe that as the diversity of generators increases, the overlap of these common features gradually decreases. This severely undermines model generalization. In contrast, focusing only on unique artifacts tends to cause overfitting to specific forgery patterns. To address this challenge, we propose LEGO (LoRA-Enabled Generator-Oriented Framework). The core mechanism of LEGO employs an MLP to modulate multiple LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) blocks, each pretrained to capture the unique artifacts of a specific generator, followed by attention-based feature fusion. Unlike conventional methods that seek a single universal solution, LEGO delegates unique artifact extraction to specialized LoRA modules by dividing its training procedure into two stages. Each LoRA module is individually trained on a single-generator dataset to learn generator-specific representations, then MLP and attention layers are trained on mixed datasets to dynamically regulate the contribution of each module. Benefiting from its modular yet robust design, LEGO can be naturally extended by incorporating new LoRA modules for adaptation to newly emerging next-generation datasets, while still achieving substantially better performance than prior SOTA methods with fewer than 30,000 training images, less than 10% of their training data, and only 5 epochs in each training stage.

Example-Based Object Detection

Medium 2605.04501
ZhiXin Sun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 EBOD 框架，利用错误样本抑制重复误检 / 漏检，无需重训练。
🎯研究动机

现有开放词汇目标检测模型仍存在重复误检 / 漏检，而每次重训练成本高昂，亟需一种无需重训练即可利用错误样本防止错误复发的方法。

❓解决问题

如何利用已有的假正例和假负例样本，在不重训练模型的前提下，防止相同错误重复出现。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，尽管开放词汇检测模型（如 SAM3）性能优异，但在实际工程中，对同一目标的持续误检或漏检不可接受，而重训练代价巨大。

🛠️主要方法

将基于提示的检测器（SAM3）与鲁棒特征匹配模块（DINOv3 和 LightGlue）集成，通过利用历史错误样本抑制重复错误。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 EBOD 框架，无需重训练即可利用错误样本抑制重复误检和漏检。
  • 将 SAM3 与 DINOv3、LightGlue 结合，实现鲁棒的特征匹配与错误纠正。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖错误样本的质量和多样性。
  • 特征匹配模块可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In recent years, object detection has achieved significant progress, especially in the field of open-vocabulary object detection. Unlike traditional methods that rely on predefined categories, open-vocabulary approaches can detect arbitrary objects based on human-provided prompts. With the advancement of prompt-based detection techniques, models such as SAM3 can even outperform some category-specific detectors trained on particular datasets without requiring additional training on those datasets. However, despite these advancements, false positives and false negatives still occur. In practical engineering applications, persistent misdetections or missed detections of the same object are unacceptable. Yet retraining the model every time such errors occur incurs substantial costs in terms of human effort, computational resources, and time. Therefore, how to leverage existing false positive and false negative samples to prevent such errors from recurring remains a highly challenging and urgent problem. To address this issue, we propose EBOD (Example-Based Object Detection), which integrates a prompt-based detector (SAM3) with robust feature matching modules (DINOv3 and LightGlue). The proposed framework effectively suppresses the repeated occurrence of false positives and false negatives by leveraging previous error examples, without requiring additional model retraining. Code is available at this https URL .

SAMIC: A Lightweight Semantic-Aware Mamba for Efficient Perceptual Image Compression

Medium 2605.04560
Jiaqian Zhang, Hao Wei, Chenyang Ge, Yanhui Zhou
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种轻量级语义感知 Mamba 模型 SAMIC，用于高效感知图像压缩，在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上优于现有方法。
🎯研究动机

现有感知图像压缩方法依赖 GAN 或扩散模型，模型复杂度高；而 Mamba 虽具有线性复杂度，但固定扫描顺序损害语义连续性和空间相关性。

❓解决问题

如何利用 Mamba 的长程建模能力和线性复杂度，同时解决其固定扫描顺序导致的语义连续性损失和长程信息衰减问题，实现高效感知图像压缩。

🔎现象分析

Mamba 的固定扫描顺序会破坏语义连续性和空间相关性，且存在严格因果约束和长程信息衰减。

🛠️主要方法

提出语义感知 Mamba 块（SAMB），通过动态聚类语义特征引导扫描；设计 SVD 启发冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），利用可学习软阈值对潜在特征进行低秩近似以减少通道冗余。

📊实验结果

在多个数据集上与现有方法比较率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度，结果优于 SOTA。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出语义感知 Mamba 块（SAMB），缓解 Mamba 的因果约束和长程信息衰减，增强语义连续性。
  • 设计 SVD 启发冗余减少模块（SVD-RRM），通过低秩近似减少通道冗余，提升压缩效率。
  • 在率失真感知权衡和模型复杂度上达到 SOTA。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能对高分辨率图像或视频的扩展性未验证。
  • 语义聚类可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Perceptual image compression focuses on preserving high visual quality under low-bitrate constraints. Most existing approaches to perceptual compression leverage the strong generative capabilities of generative adversarial networks or diffusion models, at the cost of substantial model complexity. To this end, we present an efficient perceptual image compression method that exploits the long-range modeling capability and linear computational complexity of state space models, with a particular focus on Mamba. Unlike existing methods that rely on an inherently fixed scanning order and consequently impair semantic continuity and spatial correlation, we develop a semantic-aware Mamba block (SAMB) to enable scanning guided by dynamically clustered semantic features, thereby alleviating the strict causality constraints and long-range information decay inherent to Mamba. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we design an SVD-inspired redundancy reduction module (SVD-RRM) that performs a low-rank approximation on the latent features by introducing a learnable soft threshold, leading to channel-wise redundancy information reduction. The proposed SAMB is integrated into both the encoder and decoder of the compression framework, whereas the SVD-RRM is incorporated only in the encoder. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method performs favorably against state-of-the-art approaches in terms of rate-distortion-perception tradeoff and model complexity. The source code and pretrained models will be available at this https URL .

VL-UniTrack: A Unified Framework with Visual-Language Prompts for UAV-Ground Visual Tracking

Medium 2605.04574
Boyue Xu, Ruichao Hou, Tongwei Ren, Gangshan Wu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 VL-UniTrack，通过视觉 - 语言提示统一框架解决无人机 - 地面视角跟踪中的特征隔离和外观匹配歧义问题。
🎯研究动机

无人机 - 地面视觉跟踪（UGVT）中，现有双流方法存在特征提取隔离和过度依赖隐式外观匹配的问题，在视角差异大时难以建立可靠对应关系，导致跟踪不可靠。

❓解决问题

如何解决双流方法中特征隔离和仅依赖外观匹配导致的跨视角对应不准确问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有双流方法在视角差异大时，隐式外观匹配难以建立可靠对应，导致跟踪不可靠。

🛠️主要方法

提出 VL-UniTrack 统一框架，使用共享编码器编码双视角特征，设计视觉 - 语言几何提示模块融合语言描述与视觉特征生成可学习提示，并通过提示引导的跨视角适配器实现充分交互，同时提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失抑制噪声传播。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在最新基准上达到最先进性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个完全统一的无人机 - 地面视觉跟踪框架，打破特征隔离。
  • 设计视觉 - 语言几何提示模块和提示引导跨视角适配器，增强跨视角特征交互。
  • 提出置信度调制互蒸馏损失，有效抑制噪声传播。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量语言描述，在无描述场景下性能未知。
  • 统一编码器可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

UAV-ground visual tracking (UGVT) aims to simultaneously track the same object from both the UAV and the ground view. However, existing two-stream methods suffer from isolated feature extraction and rely heavily on implicit appearance matching, which struggles to establish reliable correspondence under drastic view differences, leading to tracking unreliability. To address these limitations, we propose VL-UniTrack, a fully unified framework enhanced by visual-language prompts. By encoding features from both views within a single shared encoder, our method breaks the barrier of feature isolation to facilitate sufficient cross-view interaction. To overcome the ambiguity caused by relying solely on appearance matching, we design visual-language geometric prompting module, which fuses language descriptions with visual features to generate learnable prompts. These prompts are then fed into our prompt-guided cross-view adapter module to enable sufficient cross-view feature interaction and to guide the learning of view-specific feature representations. Furthermore, a confidence-modulated mutual distillation loss is proposed to regularize the training by mitigating noise propagation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the latest benchmark. The code can be downloaded in this https URL

Reference-based Category Discovery: Unsupervised Object Detection with Category Awareness

Medium 2605.04606
Yichen Li, Qiankun Liu, Ying Fu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出无监督目标检测方法 RefCD，利用参考图像特征相似性实现类别感知检测。
🎯研究动机

传统目标检测依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂；无监督方法虽能生成伪框但缺乏类别信息，无法实现类别感知分类。

❓解决问题

如何在无任何人工标注的情况下实现类别感知的目标检测。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出参考图像类别发现（RefCD）框架，通过计算预测对象与未标注参考图像之间的特征相似性，并设计特征相似性损失来引导潜在类别特定特征的学习，同时支持无参考图像的类别无关检测。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 RefCD，首个无需任何标注即可实现类别感知检测的无监督检测器。
  • 设计特征相似性损失，有效利用参考图像引导类别特征学习。
  • 提供统一的框架，同时支持类别感知和类别无关检测。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖参考图像的质量和多样性，可能影响类别发现效果。
  • 未在复杂场景或小目标上验证性能。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Traditional one-shot detection methods have addressed the closed-set problem in object detection, but the high cost of data annotation remains a critical challenge. General unsupervised methods generate pseudo boxes without category labels, thus failing to achieve category-aware classification. To overcome these limitations, we propose Reference-based Category Discovery (RefCD), an unsupervised detector that enables category-aware\footnotemark[1] detection without any manually annotated labels. It leverages feature similarity between predicted objects and unlabeled reference images. Unlike previous unsupervised methods that lack category guidance and one-shot methods which require labeled data, RefCD introduces a carefully designed feature similarity loss to explicitly guide the learning of potential category-specific features. Additionally, RefCD supports category-agnostic detection without reference images, serving as a unified framework. Comprehensive quantitative and qualitative analysis of category-aware and category-agnostic detection results demonstrates its effectiveness, and RefCD can learn category information in an unsupervised paradigm even without category labels.

Contact Matrix: Enhancing Dance Motion Synthesis with Precise Interaction Modeling

Medium 2605.04662
Xuhai Chen, Zhi Cen, Huaijin Pi, Sida Peng, Xiaowei Zhou, Yong Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出两阶段框架，通过身体部分 VQ-VAE 和接触感知扩散模型提升双人舞蹈运动合成中的交互精度。
🎯研究动机

生成真实反应运动（如双人舞）面临交互约束严格、可行解空间有限、高质量数据稀缺、运动模式复杂等挑战，现有方法难以精确建模交互细节。

❓解决问题

如何从固定动作中生成高质量、交互精确的双人舞蹈反应运动。

🔎现象分析

双人舞蹈中交互细节复杂且丰富，现有方法在交互保真度和节奏同步性上不足。

🛠️主要方法

两阶段框架：第一阶段使用带独立身体部分编码器和联合解码器的运动 VQ-VAE，通过专用码本增强表示能力并动态建模身体部分依赖；第二阶段提出接触感知扩散模型，联合生成运动和个体间接触矩阵，实现显式交互建模并在采样中提供精确约束。

📊实验结果

在双人舞蹈数据集上评估，与 Duolando 相比，FID_k 从 25.30 降至 8.89，FID_cd 从 9.97 降至 8.01，BED 从 0.2858 提升至 0.4606。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出身体部分分离的 VQ-VAE，提升运动表示能力并防止生成不一致。
  • 提出接触感知扩散模型，通过联合生成接触矩阵显式建模交互，提高交互精度和约束。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对双人舞蹈场景，未验证其他交互场景。
  • 依赖固定动作输入，未考虑双向交互。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Generating realistic reactive motions, in which one person reacts to the fixed motions of others, is challenging due to strict interaction constraints and a limited feasible solution space. This paper focuses on a typical scenario: duet dance, where high-quality data is scarce, motion patterns are complex, and the details of human interactions are both intricate and abundant. To tackle these challenges, we propose a novel two-stage framework. In the first stage, we introduce a motion VQ-VAE with separate body-part encoders and a joint decoder, enabling specialized codebooks to enhance representation capacity while dynamically modeling dependencies across body parts during decoding, thereby preventing inconsistencies in the generated motions. In the second stage, we propose a contact-aware diffusion model for reactive motion generation that jointly generates motion and a contact matrix between individuals, enabling explicit interaction modeling and providing guidance toward more precise and constrained interaction dynamics during sampling. Experiments show that our method outperforms Duolando with lower $\text{FID}_k$ (8.89 vs. 25.30) and $\text{FID}_{cd}$ (8.01 vs. 9.97), as well as a higher BED (0.4606 vs. 0.2858), indicating improved interaction fidelity and rhythmic synchronization.

Not Every Subject Should Stay: Machine Unlearning for Noisy Engagement Recognition

Medium 2605.04713
Alexander Vedernikov
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出基于主题级机器遗忘的噪声参与识别后处理方法，无需完全重训即可移除问题主题影响。
🎯研究动机

参与识别数据集常含噪声和主观标注，且按主题索引，训练后难以低成本移除问题主题的影响。现有方法多在训练前或训练中处理样本级噪声，不适用于训练后移除整个主题。

❓解决问题

如何在已训练的参与识别模型中，无需完全重训即可移除问题主题的影响？

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

基于主题级机器遗忘：从全数据训练基线模型开始，用模型依赖代理排序候选有害主题，应用轻量近似遗忘更新，与仅保留好主题的从头训练模型对比。

📊实验结果

在 DAiSEE 和 EngageNet 数据集上，使用 TCCT-Net 平台，评估基线、遗忘和 oracle 三种模型状态。K=3 遗忘集设置下，遗忘模型恢复 89.3% 和 92.5% 的 oracle 增益，成本约为重训的四分之一。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出主题级机器遗忘作为参与识别后处理机制，解决训练后移除问题主题的问题。
  • 在 DAiSEE 和 EngageNet 上验证，遗忘模型恢复 89.3% 和 92.5% 的 oracle 增益，成本约为重训的四分之一。
⚠️方法局限
  • 有效性依赖于主题选择质量。
  • 仅在中等遗忘集大小下效果最强，极端大小下可能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Engagement recognition datasets are typically subject-indexed and often contain noisy, subjective supervision, making post-hoc dataset revision a practical problem. Existing noisy-label and data-cleaning methods largely operate at the sample level before or during training, but do not directly address a different question: once a model has already been trained, can the influence of an entire problematic subject be removed without full retraining? We study this setting through subject-level machine unlearning as a post-hoc sanitization mechanism for engagement recognition. Starting from a baseline trained on all subjects, we rank candidate harmful subjects using a model-dependent proxy, apply a lightweight approximate unlearning update, and compare the result against an oracle model retrained from scratch on the retained subjects only. We instantiate this protocol on DAiSEE and EngageNet using Tensor-Convolution and Convolution-Transformer Network (TCCT-Net) as a fixed platform and evaluate three matched model states under the same removal scenario: baseline, unlearned, and oracle. In representative K=3 forget-set settings, the unlearned model recovers 89.3% and 92.5% of the oracle gain on EngageNet and DAiSEE, respectively, at roughly one quarter of retraining cost. Across the tested small-audit regimes, effectiveness is strongest at an intermediate forget-set size, indicating that approximate subject-level unlearning is a useful low-cost correction mechanism, but one whose benefit depends on subject selection quality and removal regime.

Morphology-Guided Cross-Task Coupling for Joint Building Height and Footprint Estimation

Medium 2605.04731
Jinzhen Han, JinByeong Lee, Jisung Kim, HongSik Yun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 MorphoFormer，通过显式编码建筑高度与足迹的跨任务耦合，在 54 城市数据集上实现高度估计 RMSE 从 3.39 降至 3.15 米。
🎯研究动机

建筑高度和足迹是城市气候、灾害风险等模型的关键输入，但现有遥感方法通常将它们作为独立回归任务，忽略了通过容积率约束的耦合关系。

❓解决问题

如何显式建模建筑高度与足迹之间的跨任务耦合，以提升联合估计精度。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 MorphoFormer 框架，包含两个互补机制：BF 引导任务解码器（BGTD）通过足迹导出的形态上下文交叉注意力门控高度分支；形态一致性损失（MCL）通过高度 - 足迹代理监督，间接迫使足迹特征编码高度相关结构。编码器为单阶段 Swin 骨干，输入 Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2 多光谱和 DEM 数据。

📊实验结果

在 54 城市地理分块数据集上，与 Swin-MTL 基线对比，高度 RMSE 从 3.39 降至 3.15 米，R²从 0.62 提升至 0.67，足迹 R²稳定在 0.80。消融实验显示 BGTD 和 MCL 分别贡献 0.11 米 RMSE 降低。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出显式编码建筑高度与足迹跨任务耦合的联合估计框架 MorphoFormer。
  • 设计 BF 引导任务解码器和形态一致性损失两个互补机制，有效提升高度估计精度。
  • 在 54 城市地理分块数据集上验证，相比 Swin-MTL 基线，高度 RMSE 降低 0.24 米，R²从 0.62 提升至 0.67。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅适用于遥感图像中的建筑高度和足迹联合估计任务。
  • 未讨论对极高密度或复杂城市区域的泛化能力。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Building height (BH) and building footprint (BF) jointly describe the vertical and horizontal extent of the built environment and are required inputs for urban climate, disaster-risk, and population-mapping models. The two parameters are coupled through floor-area-ratio (FAR) constraints, yet remote-sensing approaches typically treat them as independent regression targets. We argue that explicitly encoding this cross-task coupling is more impactful than further refining individual encoders, and propose MorphoFormer, a joint BH/BF estimation framework built around two complementary mechanisms: (i) a BF-Guided Task Decoder (BGTD) that gates the height branch via cross-attention on a footprint-derived morphology context, and (ii) a Morphology Consistency Loss (MCL) that supervises a height-from-footprint surrogate against the ground-truth BH, indirectly forcing the BF feature to encode height-correlated structure. The encoder is a single-stage Swin backbone fed by Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 multispectral, and DEM inputs, trained and evaluated on a geo-blocked split of 54 cities. Against a Swin-MTL baseline at identical receptive field, MorphoFormer reduces BH test RMSE from 3.39 to 3.15 m (R^2 improves 0.62 -> 0.67) with BF R^2 stable at 0.80. Controlled ablations at identical capacity attribute most of this 0.24 m improvement to the two proposed mechanisms: removing BGTD raises BH RMSE by 0.11 m and removing MCL raises it by 0.11 m, with the residual approximately 0.02 m falling within the noise floor of encoder-side variations. Because both mechanisms act on cross-task representations rather than pixels, the design carries no intrinsic dependence on input resolution.

VC-FeS: Viewpoint-Conditioned Feature Selection for Vehicle Re-identification in Thermal Vision

Medium 2605.04750
Yasod Ginige, Ransika Gunasekara, Darsha Hewavitharana, Manjula Ariyarathne, Peshala Jayasekara, Ranga Rodrigo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出视角条件特征选择方法，在热红外车辆重识别中超越 SOTA 19.7% mAP。
🎯研究动机

热红外图像中同类物体因缺乏颜色和纹理信息而高度相似，且视角变化导致特征差异大，现有方法性能差。

❓解决问题

热红外图像中车辆重识别因颜色缺失、纹理弱化和视角变化导致的特征混淆问题。

🔎现象分析

热红外图像中同类物体外观高度相似，且不同视角下特征差异显著，现有 RGB 预训练模型直接应用效果不佳。

🛠️主要方法

构建视角条件特征向量，并在不同特征空间中进行区域特定特征比较，以适配热红外领域。

📊实验结果

在 RGBNT100 (IR)车辆数据集和自采热红外海事数据集上评估，mAP 分别提升 19.7% 和 12.8%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出视角条件特征选择方法，有效利用 RGB 预训练 ViT 特征提取器并适应热红外领域。
  • 在 RGBNT100 和自采热红外海事数据集上分别超越 SOTA 19.7% 和 12.8% mAP。
  • 将公开首个用于海上船只识别的热红外数据集。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖视角条件，可能对视角估计误差敏感。
  • 仅针对热红外图像，泛化到其他单通道图像需验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Identification of less-articulated objects using single-channel images, such as thermal images, is important in many applications, such as surveillance. However, in this domain, existing methods show poor performance due to high similarity among objects of the same category in the absence of color information (overlooking shape information) and de-emphasized texture information. Furthermore, variability in viewpoint adds more complexity as the features vary from side to side. We address these issues by constructing viewpoint-conditioned feature vectors and area-specific feature comparisons in separate feature spaces. These interventions enable leveraging the advancements of existing RGB-pre-trained ViT feature extractors while effectively adapting them to address the challenges specific to the thermal domain. We test our system with RGBNT100 (IR) vehicle dataset and a thermal maritime dataset acquired by us. Our results surpass the state-of-the-art methods by 19.7% and 12.8% for the above datasets in mAP scores, respectively. We also plan to make our thermal dataset available, the first of its kind for maritime vessel identification.

Hybrid Congestion Classification Framework Using Flow-Guided Attention and Empirical Mode Decomposition

Medium 2605.04752
Eugene Kofi Okrah Denteh, Blessing Agyei Kyem, Joshua Kofi Asamoah, Armstrong Aboah
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 FLO-EMD 混合框架，融合光流引导注意力与经验模态分解，实现高精度交通拥堵分类。
🎯研究动机

现有交通拥堵分类方法要么依赖视觉外观（忽略动态运动），要么仅分析信号（缺乏空间上下文），两者互补的局限性阻碍了准确分类。

❓解决问题

如何联合建模道路场景上下文与非平稳交通运动，实现准确的拥堵程度分类。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

FLO-EMD：密集光流引导通道和空间注意力以增强运动相关区域特征；同时聚合光流统计量，经 EMD 分解提取固有时间成分，并与学习到的时空表示融合，分类轻、中、重度拥堵。

📊实验结果

在四个监控网络的 1050 个 5 秒片段上测试，整体准确率 97.5%，加权 F1=0.9742；消融和敏感性分析量化了 EMD、本征模态函数数量和运动描述子的贡献。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出光流引导注意力机制，使 RGB 特征聚焦于运动相关区域。
  • 引入经验模态分解处理非平稳交通运动，提取紧凑运动轨迹的固有时间成分。
  • 在四个监控网络的 1050 个 5 秒片段上达到 97.5% 准确率，优于基线方法。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量光流计算，在低光照或遮挡场景下性能可能下降。
  • EMD 分解的计算开销可能限制实时应用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Accurate traffic congestion classification requires models that jointly capture roadway scene context and non-stationary traffic motion, yet most prior work treats these requirements in isolation. Vision-based methods often depend on appearance cues with standard temporal pooling, which can bias predictions toward static infrastructure, whereas signal-based approaches characterize temporal dynamics but lack the spatial context needed for scene-level localization. These complementary limitations motivate a unified framework that links motion evidence to spatial feature selection while preserving data-adaptive temporal characterization. This study therefore proposes FLO-EMD, a hybrid approach that couples motion-guided attention with empirical, data-driven temporal decomposition. Dense optical flow guides channel and spatial attention so that RGB features are refined toward motion-relevant regions. In parallel, aggregated flow statistics form compact motion traces that are decomposed using Empirical Mode Decomposition (EMD) to extract intrinsic temporal components. The resulting EMD embedding is fused with learned spatiotemporal representations to classify light, medium, and heavy congestion. Experiments on 1,050 five-second clips from four surveillance networks show that FLO-EMD achieves 97.5% overall test accuracy (weighted F1 = 0.9742), outperforming established baselines and remaining robust across diverse environmental conditions; ablation and sensitivity analyses further quantify the contributions of EMD, the number of intrinsic mode functions, and the selected motion descriptors.

Lightweight Cross-Spectral Face Recognition via Contrastive Alignment and Distillation

Medium 2605.04769
Anjith George, Sebastien Marcel
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出轻量级跨光谱人脸识别框架，通过对比对齐和蒸馏实现高效异质人脸识别。
🎯研究动机

现有异质人脸识别方法依赖高计算量模型，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。

❓解决问题

如何在保持高性能的同时，实现轻量化的跨光谱人脸识别。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

采用混合 CNN-Transformer 模型，通过对比对齐和蒸馏技术，仅需少量配对异质数据即可端到端训练。

📊实验结果

在多个异质人脸识别和人脸识别基准上进行综合实验，摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出轻量级 HFR 框架，适用于同质和异质场景。
  • 在多个基准上达到 SOTA 或竞争性能，同时保持低计算需求。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖特定模态对（如热成像到可见光），泛化性需验证。
  • 轻量化设计可能在高精度要求场景下性能受限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Heterogeneous Face Recognition (HFR) aims at matching face images captured across different sensing modalities, such as thermal-to-visible or near-infrared-to-visible, enhancing the usability of face recognition systems in challenging real-world conditions. Although recent HFR methods have achieved significant improvements in performance, many rely on computationally expensive models, making them impractical for deployment on resource-limited edge devices. In this work, we introduce a lightweight yet effective HFR framework by adapting a hybrid CNN-Transformer model originally developed for RGB homogeneous face recognition. Our approach enables efficient end-to-end training with only a small amount of paired heterogeneous data, while still maintaining strong performance on standard RGB face recognition benchmarks. This makes it suitable for both homogeneous and heterogeneous settings. Comprehensive experiments on several challenging HFR and face recognition benchmarks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance while keeping computational requirements low.

Exploring Clustering Capability of Inpainting Model Embeddings for Pattern-based Individual Identification

Medium 2605.04904
Jens van Bijsterveld, Daniele Avitabile, Fons J. Verbeek, Rita Pucci
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用图像修复辅助任务增强动物个体识别中皮肤图案特征的提取能力。
🎯研究动机

动物个体识别对生物多样性监测至关重要，但现有模型常关注背景或体型等非特异性特征，忽略了皮肤图案这一稳定且个体化的特征。

❓解决问题

如何使机器学习模型在提取个体视觉嵌入时更关注皮肤图案结构，而非背景或体型细节。

🔎现象分析

现有个体识别模型倾向于利用背景或体型特征，这些特征随时间变化大或非个体特有，导致识别鲁棒性不足。

🛠️主要方法

提出以图像修复（inpainting）作为辅助任务，通过修复任务特定掩码来增强编码器对皮肤图案的敏感性，并比较四种编码器骨干网络。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 探索图像修复辅助任务用于增强动物个体识别中皮肤图案特征提取的有效性。
  • 提供基于斑马鱼案例的编码器骨干网络比较分析，包括分类准确率、嵌入聚类指标和 GradCAM 可视化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅以斑马鱼为案例，可能不直接推广到其他物种。
  • 未提供与其他个体识别方法的定量对比结果。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In this paper, we explore deep learning techniques for individual identification of animals based on their skin patterns. Individual identification is crucial in biodiversity monitoring, since it enables analysis of decline or growth of populations, or intra-species interactions within populations. Models trained for the task of individual identification often do not focus on the skin pattern of animals, but on background details or body shape details. These characteristics are not individually specific, or can change drastically through time. We focus on techniques that will make machine learning models more responsive to skin pattern structure when extracting individual visual embeddings from images. For this, we explore image inpainting of task-specific masks as an auxiliary task to enhance ML-based individual identification from animal skin patterns. We propose a comparative analysis among four models as an encoder backbone for the individual identification task. We focus on the case study of zebrafish, which is a widely recognized biological model organism, and which exhibits individually identifying skin patterns. To evaluate encoder backbone performance, we present standard metrics for classification accuracy, embedding clustering metrics, and GradCAM visualizations.

Chaotic Contrastive Learning for Robust Texture Classification

Medium 2605.05012
Joao B Florindo
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：结合混沌动力学的对比学习框架，通过混沌映射增强数据，提升纹理分类的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
🎯研究动机

纹理分类面临类间相似度高、结构模式对尺度和光照敏感等挑战，现有 CNN 和 ViT 方法依赖大量标注数据或过度关注颜色形状特征，跨域泛化能力不足。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖大规模标注数据的情况下，学习对噪声和光照变化鲁棒的纹理特征，提升分类准确性和泛化性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出混沌对比学习框架：1）使用 Logistic、Tent、Sine 等混沌映射作为非线性数据增强，基于遍历理论迫使网络学习拓扑鲁棒特征；2）设计注意力特征融合模块，结合监督大骨干网络的高层语义特征与混沌预训练小编码器的低频结构特征。

📊实验结果

在 FMD、UMD、KTH-TIPS2-b、DTD、GTOS 和 1200Tex 六个纹理数据集上实验，方法优于现有 SOTA，在所有数据集上均取得有前景的准确率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将确定性混沌动力学引入自监督对比学习，用于纹理分类的数据增强。
  • 提出注意力特征融合机制，有效结合高层语义与低频结构特征。
  • 在六个纹理基准上达到 SOTA，验证了方法的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 混沌映射的参数选择可能影响性能，需要进一步研究自适应策略。
  • 方法在非纹理任务上的泛化能力未在摘要中探讨。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Texture classification is a pivotal task in computer vision, presenting unique challenges due to high inter-class similarity and the sensitivity of structural patterns to scale and illumination changes. While Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and recent Vision Transformers have set performance benchmarks, they often require extensive labeled datasets or struggle to generalize across domains due to an over-reliance on color and shape features. This paper introduces a novel framework that synergizes Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) with deterministic chaotic dynamics. We propose a chaotic contrastive pre-training strategy, where pixel-wise chaotic maps, specifically Logistic, Tent, and Sine maps, act as non-linear data augmentation techniques. These chaotic perturbations, grounded in ergodic theory, force the network to learn topologically robust features by mimicking complex environmental noise and reflectance variations. Furthermore, we introduce an attention-based feature ensemble that fuses high-level semantic representations from a supervised large backbone with low-frequency structural features from a chaos-pretrained tiny encoder. Experimental results on six texture benchmarks (FMD, UMD, KTH-TIPS2-b, DTD, GTOS, and 1200Tex) demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches and achieving promising accuracies on all the analyzed datasets.

Prompt-Anchored Vision-Text Distillation for Lifelong Person Re-identification

Medium 2605.05027
Wen Wen, Hao Chen, Shiliang Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出提示锚定的视觉 - 文本蒸馏框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，平衡终身行人重识别的稳定性与可塑性。
🎯研究动机

终身行人重识别面临语义漂移、适应性有限和灾难性遗忘问题，现有无样本方法多依赖纯视觉蒸馏或参数正则化，忽视了文本等辅助模态在保持语义稳定性和增量可塑性方面的潜力。

❓解决问题

解决终身行人重识别中模型在新领域出现时语义漂移、适应性不足和灾难性遗忘的问题。

🔎现象分析

观察到预训练视觉 - 语言模型中的冻结文本编码器可作为跨领域的稳定语义锚点。

🛠️主要方法

提出非对称视觉 - 文本蒸馏框架 PAD：文本侧通过蒸馏提示在固定语义空间下保持视觉 - 文本对齐，作为全局语义参考；视觉侧使用基于 EMA 的教师模型和自适应提示池，通过分配新槽位并冻结旧槽位实现领域自适应。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PAD 框架，利用冻结文本编码器作为语义锚点，实现视觉 - 文本语义对齐和跨领域泛化。
  • 设计非对称蒸馏机制，文本侧提供稳定语义参考，视觉侧通过自适应提示池实现领域级适应。
  • 在多个已见和未见领域上显著超越现有方法，实现稳定性与可塑性的强平衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖预训练视觉 - 语言模型，可能受限于模型规模和领域覆盖。
  • 提示池的扩展策略可能增加存储开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Lifelong person re-identification (LReID) aims to train a generalizable model with sequentially collected data. However, such models often suffer from semantic drift, limited adaptability, and catastrophic forgetting as new domains emerge. Existing exemplar-free approaches largely rely on visual-only distillation or parameter regularization, while overlooking the potential of auxiliary modalities, such as text, to preserve semantic stability and enable incremental plasticity. We observe that the frozen text encoder in pretrained vision-language models can serve as a stable semantic anchor across domains. To decouple the roles of vision and text, we propose Prompt-Anchored vision-text Distillation (PAD), an asymmetric vision-text framework for semantic alignment and cross-domain generalization. On the textual side, we distill prompts to preserve vision-text alignment under a fixed semantic space, acting as a global semantic reference rather than a dominant learning signal. On the visual side, an EMA-based teacher with an adaptive prompt pool enables domain-wise adaptation by allocating new slots while freezing past ones. Extensive experiments show that PAD substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods across seen and unseen domains, achieving a strong balance between stability and plasticity. Project page is available at this https URL .

Beyond Fixed Thresholds and Domain-Specific Benchmarks for Explainable Multi-Task Classification in Autonomous Vehicles

Medium 2605.04299
Maryam Sadat Hosseini Azad, Shahriar Baradaran Shokouhi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出自适应阈值选择方法和跨文化自动驾驶可解释数据集，提升多任务分类性能。
🎯研究动机

自动驾驶场景理解依赖深度学习黑箱模型，缺乏透明性和安全性；现有固定阈值方法在多任务场景下表现次优，且缺乏领域特定和跨文化评估基准。

❓解决问题

如何设计准确且跨文化的可解释自动驾驶系统，解决多任务分类中固定阈值次优和评估基准缺失的问题。

🔎现象分析

传统固定阈值方法在多任务场景下是次优的；跨文化驾驶行为模式存在差异。

🛠️主要方法

提出置信度阈值敏感性分析，评估不同阈值以确定各任务最优决策边界；引入自适应阈值选择方法；构建包含 958 张图像及人工标注的 IUST-XAI-AD 数据集。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自适应阈值选择方法，通过置信度阈值敏感性分析提升多任务分类 F1 分数。
  • 引入 IUST-XAI-AD 数据集，填补领域特定和跨文化评估基准的空白。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模较小（958 张图像），可能限制泛化性。
  • 仅针对自动驾驶场景，方法在其他领域的适用性未验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Scene understanding is a vital part of autonomous driving systems, which requires the use of deep learning models. Deep learning methods are intrinsically black box models, which lack transparency and safety in autonomous driving. To make these systems transparent, multi-task visual understanding has become crucial for explainable autonomous driving perception systems, where simultaneous prediction of multiple driving behaviors and their underlying explanations is essential for safe navigation and human trust in autonomous vehicles. In order to design an accurate and cross-cultural explainable autonomous driving system, we introduce a comprehensive confidence threshold sensitivity analysis that evaluates various threshold values to identify optimal decision boundaries for different tasks. Our analysis demonstrates that traditional fixed threshold approaches are suboptimal for multi-task scenarios. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that our adaptive threshold selection methodology improves F1-scores across different tasks. In addition, we introduce IUST-XAI-AD, a novel dataset consisting of 958 images with human annotations for driving decisions and corresponding reasoning. This dataset addresses the critical gap in domain-specific evaluation benchmarks for distinct driving contexts and provides a more challenging test environment compared to existing datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that confidence threshold sensitivity analysis can significantly improve model performance, while the introduction of the IUST-XAI-AD dataset reveals important insights about cross-cultural driving behavior patterns. The combined contributions of this work provide both methodological advances and practical evaluation tools that can accelerate the development of more reliable, explainable, and culturally-adaptive autonomous driving systems for global deployment.

Intermediate Representations are Strong AI-Generated Image Detectors

Medium 2605.04358
Zhenhan Huang, Pin-Yu Chen, Tejaswini Pedapati, Jianxi Gao
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：利用中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性差异，提出一种无需训练的搜索式 AI 生成图像检测方法。
🎯研究动机

现有 AI 生成图像检测方法中，基于训练的方法计算成本高且泛化性差，而无需训练的方法检测性能不足，亟需一种高效且泛化强的检测方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖训练的情况下，高效且准确地检测 AI 生成的图像，并提升跨数据域的泛化能力。

🔎现象分析

真实图像与 AI 生成图像在中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性上存在差异，可利用此差异进行检测。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种基于搜索的方法，通过计算原始图像嵌入与扰动后嵌入的相似性来区分真实与 AI 生成图像，利用中间层的数据嵌入敏感性。

📊实验结果

在 GenImage 和 Forensics Small 两个基准上评估，与无训练和有训练的 SOTA 方法对比，AUROC 指标提升显著。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种无需训练的 AI 生成图像检测方法，利用中间层嵌入对扰动的敏感性。
  • 在 GenImage 和 Forensics Small 基准上，相比现有无训练和有训练方法均取得性能提升，尤其在 Forensics Small 上 AUROC 提升 39.61%（vs 最佳无训练方法）和 5.14%（vs 最佳有训练方法）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖扰动策略的选择，可能影响泛化性。
  • 未在更多样化的生成模型和图像类型上验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The rapid advancement in generative AI models has enabled the creation of photorealistic images. At the same time, there are growing concerns about the potential misuse and dangers of generated content, as well as a pressing need for effective AI-generated image detectors. However, current training-based detection techniques are typically computationally costly and can hardly be generalized to unseen data domains, while training-free methods fall short in detection performance. To bridge this gap, we propose a search-based method employing data embedding sensitivity in intermediate layers to detect AI-generated images. Given a set of real and AI-generated images, our method examines the similarity between original image embeddings and perturbed image embeddings, and detects AI-generated images based on the similarity. We examine the proposed method on two comprehensive benchmarks: GenImage and Forensics Small. Our method exhibits improved performance across different datasets compared to both training-free and training-based state-of-the-art methods. On average, our method achieves the largest performance gain on the Forensics Small benchmark by 39.61% compared to the best training-free method and 5.14% compared to the best training-based method in AUROC score.

Modeling Subjective Urban Perception with Human Gaze

Medium 2605.00764
Lin Che, Xi Wang, Marc Pollefeys, Konrad Schindler, Martin Raubal, Peter Kiefer
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：引入眼动追踪数据构建城市感知数据集，提出注视引导框架提升主观城市感知建模。
🎯研究动机

现有城市感知建模方法直接使用街景图像，忽略了人类通过注视形成主观判断的感知过程，缺乏对感知机制的建模。

❓解决问题

如何利用人类注视行为数据来改进主观城市感知的预测模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出注视引导的城市感知框架，包含三种设置：仅注视建模、注视与显式语义场景表示融合、注视与隐式丰富视觉表示融合。

📊实验结果

实验表明仅注视即可携带有效预测信号，融合注视与场景表示能进一步提升预测性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 构建了 Place Pulse-Gaze 数据集，包含街景图像、同步眼动追踪记录和个体感知标签。
  • 提出 Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework，系统研究注视行为对主观城市感知建模的贡献。
⚠️方法局限
  • 数据集规模可能有限，泛化性需验证。
  • 框架依赖眼动追踪设备，实际应用成本较高。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Urban perception describes how people subjectively evaluate urban environments, shaping how cities are experienced and understood. Existing computational approaches primarily model urban perception directly from street view images, but largely ignore the human perceptual process through which such judgments are formed. In this paper, we introduce Place Pulse-Gaze, an urban perception dataset that augments street view images with synchronized eye-tracking recordings and individual perception labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework to study how gaze behavior contributes to the modeling of subjective urban perception. The framework systematically investigates three complementary settings: gaze-only modeling, gaze fusion with explicit semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations. Experiments show that gaze alone already carries useful predictive signals for subjective urban perception, and that integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction under both semantic and richer visual representations. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of incorporating human perceptual processes into urban scene understanding and open a direction for gaze-guided multimodal urban computing.

视觉-语言模型 (VLM/MLLM) 26 篇

When Relations Break: Analyzing Relation Hallucination in Vision-Language Model Under Rotation and Noise

High 2605.05045
Philip Wootaek Shin, Ajay Narayanan Sridhar, Sivani Devarapalli, Rui Zhang, Jack Sampson, Vijaykrishnan Narayanan
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：研究发现视觉扰动（旋转和噪声）会显著加剧 VLM 的关系幻觉，现有预处理策略只能部分缓解。
🎯研究动机

视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现强劲，但关系推理（物体间交互）容易产生幻觉，而现有研究对视觉扰动如何影响关系幻觉缺乏系统分析。

❓解决问题

系统研究旋转和噪声等视觉扰动对 VLM 关系幻觉的影响，并评估现有缓解策略的有效性。

🔎现象分析

即使轻微的旋转和噪声也会显著降低模型的关系推理能力；提示增强和预处理（方向校正、去噪）只能部分改善，无法完全消除幻觉。

🛠️主要方法

在多个 VLM 和数据集上，通过施加旋转和噪声扰动，评估关系推理性能；并测试基于提示的增强和预处理策略（方向校正、去噪）。

📊实验结果

在多个模型和数据集上进行了实验，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次系统分析旋转和噪声对 VLM 关系幻觉的影响，揭示感知鲁棒性与关系理解之间的差距。
  • 评估现有缓解策略的局限性，指出需要更鲁棒、几何感知的 VLM。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅研究了旋转和噪声两种扰动，其他类型扰动（如遮挡、光照）未涉及。
  • 缓解策略仅测试了提示增强和预处理，未探索模型架构或训练层面的改进。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong multimodal performance but remain prone to relation hallucination, which requires accurate reasoning over inter-object interactions. We study the impact of visual perturbations, specifically rotation and noise, and show that even mild distortions significantly degrade relational reasoning across models and datasets. We further evaluate prompt-based augmentation and preprocessing strategies (orientation correction and denoising), finding that while they offer partial improvements, they do not fully resolve hallucinations. Our results reveal a gap between perceptual robustness and relational understanding, highlighting the need for more robust, geometry-aware VLMs.

UAV as Urban Construction Change Monitor: A New Benchmark and Change Captioning Model

High 2605.04409
Yupeng Gao, Tianyu Li, Guoqing Wang, Yang Yang
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出原型引导的任务自适应框架 PTNet 和 UAV 城市变化监测数据集 UCCD，在遥感图像变化描述任务上超越现有方法。
🎯研究动机

现有遥感图像变化描述方法依赖隐式特征差分，缺乏结构化变化语义建模，且难以协调变化检测与描述生成之间的表征冲突；同时现有基准对高分辨率城市施工场景覆盖不足。

❓解决问题

如何显式建模结构化变化语义并解耦任务特定表征，实现变化描述与检测的联合优化。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 PTNet，包含可学习原型库引导跨时交互、多头门控解耦任务表征、检测空间先验注入描述生成。

📊实验结果

在 UCCD 和 WHU-CDC 数据集上实验，PTNet 一致优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 PTNet 原型引导任务自适应框架，显式建模结构化变化语义并解耦变化检测与描述生成。
  • 构建 UCCD 大规模 UAV 城市变化监测基准，含 9000 对高分辨率图像和 45000 句标注。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖高质量原型库初始化。
  • UCCD 数据集仅覆盖城市施工场景，泛化性待验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning (RSICC) aims to generate spatially grounded natural language descriptions of scene evolution from bi-temporal imagery, moving beyond binary change masks toward semantic-level understanding. However, existing methods rely on implicit feature differencing without explicitly modeling structured change semantics, and struggle to reconcile the conflicting representation demands of change detection and caption generation. In addition, current benchmarks provide limited coverage of high-resolution urban construction scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose PTNet, a prototype-guided task-adaptive framework for joint change captioning and detection. PTNet explicitly models structured change semantics through a learnable prototype bank that guides cross-temporal interaction, disentangles task-specific representations via multi-head gating, and injects detection-derived spatial priors into caption generation, enabling coherent semantic correspondence while preserving fine-grained spatial sensitivity. Furthermore, we construct UCCD, a large-scale UAV-based benchmark comprising 9,000 high-resolution image pairs and 45,000 annotated sentences for urban construction monitoring. Extensive experiments on UCCD and WHU-CDC demonstrate that PTNet consistently outperforms existing methods. The dataset and source code are publicly available at this https URL .

Joint Semantic Token Selection and Prompt Optimization for Interpretable Prompt Learning

High 2605.04425
Yating Wang, Yaqi Zhao, Yongshun Gong, Yilong Yin, Haoliang Sun
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 IPL 框架，通过交替优化离散语义标记选择和连续提示学习，提升 CLIP 提示学习的可解释性和准确性。
🎯研究动机

连续提示学习在 CLIP 等视觉 - 语言模型微调中易过拟合且可解释性差，而离散提示优化依赖大模型、计算成本高且扩展性有限。

❓解决问题

如何在保持下游任务适应性的同时，提升提示学习的可解释性并降低计算开销。

🔎现象分析

连续提示学习导致过拟合和可解释性不足；离散提示优化依赖外部大模型，成本高且扩展性差。

🛠️主要方法

提出 IPL 框架，将语义标记选择建模为近似子模优化问题，选择人类可理解且语义多样的标记，并通过交替优化策略整合离散标记选择与连续提示调优。

📊实验结果

在多个基准上对五种代表性提示学习方法进行实验，IPL 一致提升可解释性和准确性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 IPL 混合框架，交替进行离散语义标记选择和连续提示优化，提升可解释性。
  • 将语义标记选择形式化为近似子模优化问题，确保标记的语义多样性和可理解性。
  • IPL 即插即用，可无缝集成到现有提示学习方法中，实验表明在多个基准上一致提升可解释性和准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖初始提示质量。
  • 子模优化近似可能引入额外计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Vision-language models such as CLIP achieve strong visual-textual alignment, but often suffer from overfitting and limited interpretability when adapted through continuous prompt learning. While discrete prompt optimization improves interpretability, it usually depends on large external models, leading to high computational costs and limited scalability. In this paper, we propose Interpretable Prompt Learning (IPL), a hybrid framework that alternates between discrete semantic token selection and continuous prompt optimization. Specifically, IPL formulates semantic token selection as an approximate submodular optimization problem, encouraging tokens that are both human-understandable and semantically diverse. It further adopts an alternating optimization strategy to integrate discrete token selection with continuous prompt tuning, improving interpretability while preserving adaptability to downstream tasks. Our framework is plug-and-play, allowing seamless integration with existing prompt learning methods. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that IPL consistently improves both interpretability and accuracy across five representative prompt learning methods, providing an effective and scalable extension to existing frameworks.

RemoteZero: Geospatial Reasoning with Zero Human Annotations

High 2605.04451
Liang Yao, Fan Liu, Shengxiang Xu, Chuanyi Zhang, Rui Min, Shimin Di, Yuhui Zheng
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：RemoteZero 提出无需人工标注坐标的遥感地理空间推理框架，利用 MLLM 的判别能力实现自验证训练。
🎯研究动机

现有地理空间推理方法虽能自动生成推理链，但仍依赖人工标注的坐标作为监督信号，无法利用海量无标注遥感数据实现自我进化。

❓解决问题

如何在不使用人工标注坐标（框监督）的情况下，实现精确的地理空间推理定位。

🔎现象分析

MLLM 在验证区域是否满足查询方面比直接生成精确坐标更擅长，存在判别能力与生成能力的不对称性。

🛠️主要方法

利用 MLLM 更强的判别能力，用内在语义验证替代几何监督，结合 GRPO 训练实现无框监督的推理，并支持迭代自进化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个无需框监督的地理空间推理框架 RemoteZero，打破对人工标注坐标的依赖。
  • 利用 MLLM 判别 - 生成不对称性，设计基于语义验证的训练方法，支持模型从无标注数据中自我进化。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MLLM 的判别能力，在复杂场景下验证准确性有限。
  • 自进化过程可能引入噪声，需要进一步稳定训练。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Geospatial reasoning requires models to resolve complex spatial semantics and user intent into precise target locations for Earth observation. Recent progress has liberated the reasoning path from manual curation, allowing models to generate their own inference chains. Yet a final dependency remains: they are still supervised by human-annotated ground-truth coordinates. This leaves the reasoning process autonomous, but not its spatial endpoint, and prevents true self-evolution on abundant unlabeled remote sensing data. To break this bottleneck, we introduce RemoteZero, a box-supervision-free framework for geospatial reasoning. RemoteZero is motivated by a simple asymmetry: an MLLM is typically better at verifying whether a region satisfies a query than at directly generating precise coordinates. Leveraging this stronger discriminative ability, RemoteZero replaces geometric supervision with intrinsic semantic verification and enables GRPO training without box annotations. The resulting framework further supports iterative self-evolution, allowing the model to improve from unlabeled remote sensing imagery through its own verification signal. Experiments show that RemoteZero achieves competitive performance against strong supervised methods, demonstrating the potential of self-verifying training for geospatial reasoning localization.

StableI2I: Spotting Unintended Changes in Image-to-Image Transition

High 2605.04453
Jiayang Li, Shuo Cao, Xiaohui Li, Zhizhen Zhang, Kaiwen Zhu, Yule Duan, Yu Qiao, Jian Zhang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 StableI2I 框架，用于评估图像到图像转换中的内容保真度和一致性。
🎯研究动机

现有 I2I 评估主要关注指令遵循和感知质量，忽略了输出图像是否保留输入图像的语义对应和空间结构。

❓解决问题

缺乏统一、动态的评估框架来显式衡量 I2I 任务中的内容保真度和前后一致性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 StableI2I 框架，无需参考图像即可评估内容保真度和一致性，并构建 StableI2I-Bench 基准测试 MLLM 的评估准确性。

📊实验结果

实验表明 StableI2I 提供准确、细粒度、可解释的评估，与人类主观判断高度相关。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 StableI2I，一个统一且动态的评估框架，用于衡量 I2I 任务中的内容保真度和一致性。
  • 构建 StableI2I-Bench 基准，系统评估 MLLM 在保真度和一致性评估任务上的准确性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 MLLM 的准确性，MLLM 的局限性可能影响评估结果。
  • 基准覆盖的任务范围可能有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

In most real-world image-to-image (I2I) scenarios, existing evaluations primarily focus on instruction following and the perceptual quality or aesthetics of the generated images. However, they largely fail to assess whether the output image preserves the semantic correspondence and spatial structure of the input image. To address this limitation, we propose StableI2I, a unified and dynamic evaluation framework that explicitly measures content fidelity and pre--post consistency across a wide range of I2I tasks without requiring reference images, including image editing and image restoration. In addition, we construct StableI2I-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the accuracy of MLLMs on such fidelity and consistency assessment tasks. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that StableI2I provides accurate, fine-grained, and interpretable evaluations of content fidelity and consistency, with strong correlations to human subjective judgments. Our framework serves as a practical and reliable evaluation tool for diagnosing content consistency and benchmarking model performance in real-world I2I systems.

Information Coordination as a Bridge: A Neuro-Symbolic Architecture for Reliable Autonomous Driving Scene Understanding

High 2605.04475
Shuo Liu, Lei Shi, Haowen Liu, Jing Xu, Yufei Gao, Yucheng Shi
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出一种以 BEV 为中心的神经符号架构 InfoCoordiBridge，通过显式协调多传感器感知输出，提升自动驾驶场景理解的可靠性和事实性。
🎯研究动机

现有 LLM 驱动的自动驾驶系统将语言模型作为后处理器，强制其对冗余或冲突的感知输出进行推理，这会放大幻觉实体和不安全结论，亟需一种能协调多源感知信息并确保推理可验证的架构。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种架构，使多传感器感知输出在进入语言推理前得到协调和融合，从而避免冗余、冲突和幻觉传播，实现可靠且可验证的场景理解。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，将语言模型作为后处理器直接对冗余或冲突的感知输出推理会放大幻觉和不安全结论；通过协调多传感器输出为单一冲突感知的场景摘要，可防止冗余和跨模态不一致的感知证据传播到高层推理。

🛠️主要方法

提出 InfoCoordiBridge，包含三部分：(i) 统一多智能体感知层，输出类型化结构化事实和模态聚焦摘要；(ii) ICA 模块，对齐并融合多源输出为单一 SceneSummary；(iii) SSRE 模块，基于 SceneSummary 进行带验证的推理。

📊实验结果

在 nuScenes 和 Waymo 数据集上评估，ICA 在保持竞争性 3D 检测精度的同时显著提升融合一致性，冗余降至 1% 以下，属性一致性约 98%；在 NuScenes-QA 和模板对齐的 Waymo-QA 基准上，SSRE 相比代表性 VLM 和 Agent 基线改善了事实基础并减少幻觉实体提及。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种 BEV 中心的神经符号架构，在感知和语言推理之间插入显式协调桥接，提升场景理解的可靠性和可验证性。
  • 设计 ICA 模块实现多传感器输出的对齐与融合，降低冗余至 1% 以下，属性一致性达约 98%。
  • 在 NuScenes-QA 和 Waymo-QA 基准上，SSRE 模块相比代表性 VLM 和 Agent 基线减少了幻觉实体提及，改善了事实基础。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖 BEV 表示的准确性，在极端传感器故障或遮挡场景下性能未知。
  • 模板对齐的 Waymo-QA 基准可能限制泛化到更开放的自然语言问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reliable autonomous driving requires scene understanding that is semantically consistent across heterogeneous sensors and verifiable at the reasoning stage. However, many recent LLM-driven driving systems attach the language model as a post-processor and force it to reason over redundant or conflicting perception outputs, which can amplify hallucinated entities and unsafe conclusions. This paper proposes InfoCoordiBridge, a BEV-centric neuro-symbolic architecture that inserts an explicit coordination bridge between perception and language reasoning. InfoCoordiBridge comprises (i) a unified multi-agent perception layer that outputs typed structured facts together with modality-focused synopses, (ii) an ICA module that aligns and fuses multi-source outputs into a single SceneSummary, and (iii) an SSRE module that performs SceneSummary-grounded reasoning with verification. Experiments on nuScenes and Waymo show that ICA preserves competitive 3D detection accuracy while substantially improving fusion consistency, reducing redundancy to below 1% and achieving about 98% attribute agreement. On NuScenes-QA and a template-aligned Waymo-QA benchmark, SSRE improves factual grounding and reduces hallucinated entity mentions compared with representative VLM and agentic baselines. Overall, by coordinating multi-sensor outputs into a single conflict-aware SceneSummary before prompting, InfoCoordiBridge prevents redundant and cross-modally inconsistent perception evidence from propagating into high-level reasoning.

SpecPL: Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning

High 2605.04504
Jingtao Zhou, Xirui Kang, Feiyang Huang, Lai-Man Po
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：从频谱粒度视角解耦视觉信号，通过反事实颗粒监督提升提示学习性能。
🎯研究动机

现有提示学习存在模态不对称，仅优化文本 token 而忽略视觉编码器的频谱粒度，限制了细粒度判别能力。

❓解决问题

如何利用频谱分解和反事实监督来增强视觉提示学习，弥合稳定性与泛化性的权衡。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

利用冻结 VAE 将视觉信号分解为低频语义和高频细节，通过冻结视觉语义库锚定文本表示，并采用反事实颗粒训练（置换高频信号）迫使模型区分视觉粒度与语义不变性。

📊实验结果

在 11 个基准上评估，达到 81.51% 调和平均准确率，验证了频谱解耦与反事实监督的有效性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出频谱解耦的提示学习方法 SpecPL，从频谱视角增强视觉粒度。
  • 设计反事实颗粒监督机制，通过置换高频信号提升细粒度判别能力。
  • 作为即插即用模块，可提升 CoOp、MaPLe 等基线性能，在 11 个基准上达到 81.51% 调和平均准确率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖冻结 VAE 的分解质量，可能受限于预训练模型。
  • 反事实训练的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Existing prompt learning for VLMs exhibits a modality asymmetry, predominantly optimizing text tokens while still relying on frozen visual encoder as holistic extractor and neglecting the spectral granularity essential for fine-grained discrimination. To bridge this, we introduce Disentangling Spectral Granularity for Prompt Learning (SpecPL), which approaches prompt learning from a novel spectral perspective via Counterfactual Granule Supervision. Specifically, we leverage a frozen VAE to decompose visual signals into semantic low-frequency bands and granular high-frequency details. A frozen Visual Semantic Bank anchors text representations to universal low-frequency invariants, mitigating overfitting. Crucially, fine-grained discrimination is driven by counterfactual granule training: by permuting high-frequency signals, we compel the model to explicitly distinguish visual granularity from semantic invariance. Uniquely, SpecPL serves as a universal plug-and-play booster, revitalizing text-oriented baselines like CoOp and MaPLe via visual-side guidance. Experiments on 11 benchmarks demonstrate competitive state-of-the-art performance, achieving a new performance ceiling of 81.51\% harmonic-mean accuracy. These results validate that spectral disentanglement with counterfactual supervision effectively bridges the gap in the stability-generalization trade-off. Code is released at this https URL .

Ilov3Splat: Instance-Level Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding in Gaussian Splatting

High 2605.04506
Binh Long Nguyen, Kien Nguyen, Sridha Sridharan, Clinton Fookes, Peyman Moghadam
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：基于 3D 高斯泼溅的实例级开放词汇 3D 场景理解框架，通过联合优化几何与语义实现语言驱动的任意物体识别。
🎯研究动机

现有方法依赖 2D 渲染匹配或点级语义关联，导致跨视角一致性差、缺乏实例级推理能力，限制了 3D 下游任务的精度。

❓解决问题

如何实现实例级、开放词汇的 3D 场景理解，使模型能根据自然语言描述识别任意物体，无需类别监督或人工标注。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法
