Influential benchmarks score model outputs under fixed inputs, such as truthfulness, instruction following, or pairwise preference, and these scores are often used to support claims about deployed alignment. This paper argues that deployment-relevant alignment cannot be inferred from model-level evaluation alone. Alignment claims should instead be indexed to the level at which evidence is collected: model-level, response-level, interaction-level, or deployment-level. Two studies support this position. First, a structured audit of eleven alignment benchmarks, extended to a sixteen-benchmark corpus, dual-coded against an eight-dimension rubric with Cohen's kappa = 0.87, finds that user-facing verification support is absent across every benchmark examined, while process steerability is nearly absent. The few interactional benchmarks identified, including tau-bench, CURATe, Rifts, and Common Ground, remain fragmented in coverage, and benchmark construction rather than data source determines what is measured. Second, a blinded cross-model stress test using 180 transcripts across three frontier models and four scaffolds finds that the same verification scaffold raises one model's verification support to ceiling while leaving another categorically unchanged. This shows that scaffold efficacy is model-dependent and that the gap identified by the audit cannot be closed at the model level alone. We propose a system-level evaluation agenda: alignment profiles instead of single scores, fixed-scaffolding protocols for comparable interactional evaluation, and reporting templates that make the inferential distance between evaluation evidence and deployment claims explicit.

From Parameter Dynamics to Risk Scoring : Quantifying Sample-Level Safety Degradation in LLM Fine-tuning

High 2605.04572
Xiao Wang, Yifei Zhang, YongKang Liu, Xiaocui Yang, Zihan Wang, Shi Feng, Daling Wang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：通过分析参数动态，揭示微调中安全退化的机制，并提出样本级风险量化方法 SQSD。
🎯研究动机

LLM 的安全对齐极其脆弱，少量良性样本的微调即可破坏从大量偏好示例中学到的安全行为，现有研究仅比较微调前后的参数和隐藏状态，忽略了微调过程中的动态演化。

❓解决问题

如何量化每个训练样本对 LLM 微调过程中安全退化的贡献程度。

🔎现象分析

良性微调导致参数累积性地向危险对齐方向漂移，逐步削弱模型安全性，且对漂移贡献更大的样本具有更高的微调风险。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SQSD 方法，通过计算样本引起的参数更新在安全方向和危险方向上的投影差异，为每个样本分配连续的风险分数。

📊实验结果

在多个模型和数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了 SQSD 的有效性和迁移性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示了微调过程中参数动态演化的安全退化机制，即参数向危险方向累积漂移。
  • 提出了 SQSD 方法，能够有效量化样本级微调风险，并展现出跨模型架构、参数规模和参数高效方法的强迁移性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 摘要未提及 SQSD 的计算效率或在大规模数据集上的可扩展性。
  • 可能仅适用于监督微调场景，对其他微调范式（如 RLHF）的适用性未明确。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Safety alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) is extremely fragile, as fine-tuning on a small number of benign samples can erase safety behaviors learned from millions of preference examples. Existing studies attempt to explain this phenomenon by comparing parameters and hidden states before and after fine-tuning, but overlook their dynamic evolution during fine-tuning. In this paper, we uncover a critical mechanism underlying safety degradation by analyzing parameter dynamics, where benign fine-tuning causes parameters to cumulatively drift toward danger-aligned directions, progressively undermining the model's safety. This finding suggests that samples contributing more to this drift has greater fine-tuning risks. Based on this insight, we propose a method of Sample-Level Quantification of Safety Degradation (SQSD), which quantifies the influence of each training sample on safety degradation. Specifically, SQSD computes continuous risk scores to samples by measuring their induced parameter updates' projection difference between danger and safety directions. Extensive experiments across multiple models and datasets demonstrate that SQSD effectively quantifies sample-level fine-tuning risks and exhibits strong transferability across model architectures, parameter scales, and parameter-efficient methods.

AgentTrust: Runtime Safety Evaluation and Interception for AI Agent Tool Use

High 2605.04785
Chenglin Yang
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：AgentTrust 是一个运行时安全层，在 AI Agent 工具调用前进行拦截并给出结构化裁决，结合反混淆、安全修复建议、多步攻击链检测和 LLM 评判，实现高准确率低延迟的安全防护。
🎯研究动机

AI Agent 通过工具调用（如文件操作、shell 命令、HTTP 请求、数据库查询）执行真实世界操作，一次不安全动作（如意外删除、凭证泄露、数据窃取）可能造成不可逆损害。现有防御不完整：事后基准只能在执行后测量行为，静态护栏无法应对混淆和多步上下文，基础设施沙箱只限制代码运行位置而不理解动作含义。

❓解决问题

在 AI Agent 工具调用执行前进行实时安全评估与拦截，防止不安全动作造成实际损害。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

AgentTrust 结合 shell 反混淆归一化器、SafeFix 安全替代建议、RiskChain 多步攻击链检测以及缓存感知的 LLM-as-Judge 对模糊输入进行裁决，输出 allow、warn、block、review 四种结构化裁决。

📊实验结果

在内部 300 场景基准上，生产规则集达到 95.0% 裁决准确率和 73.7% 风险级别准确率，端到端延迟为低毫秒级。在 630 场景基准上，补丁规则集达到 96.7% 裁决准确率，包括对 shell 混淆载荷约 93%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AgentTrust 运行时安全层，在工具调用执行前进行拦截和结构化裁决。
  • 发布包含 300 个场景的六类风险基准和 630 个独立构建的真实世界对抗场景。
  • 在内部基准上，生产规则集达到 95.0% 裁决准确率和 73.7% 风险级别准确率，端到端延迟为低毫秒级。
  • 在 630 场景基准上，补丁规则集达到 96.7% 裁决准确率，对 shell 混淆载荷约 93%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 补丁规则集在 630 场景基准上的评估并非零样本，可能依赖特定规则调整。
  • LLM-as-Judge 组件可能引入额外延迟和成本，且对模糊输入的处理能力有限。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Modern AI agents execute real-world side effects through tool calls such as file operations, shell commands, HTTP requests, and database queries. A single unsafe action, including accidental deletion, credential exposure, or data exfiltration, can cause irreversible harm. Existing defenses are incomplete: post-hoc benchmarks measure behavior after execution, static guardrails miss obfuscation and multi-step context, and infrastructure sandboxes constrain where code runs without understanding what an action means. We present AgentTrust, a runtime safety layer that intercepts agent tool calls before execution and returns a structured verdict: allow, warn, block, or review. AgentTrust combines a shell deobfuscation normalizer, SafeFix suggestions for safer alternatives, RiskChain detection for multi-step attack chains, and a cache-aware LLM-as-Judge for ambiguous inputs. We release a 300-scenario benchmark across six risk categories and an additional 630 independently constructed real-world adversarial scenarios. On the internal benchmark, the production-only ruleset achieves 95.0% verdict accuracy and 73.7% risk-level accuracy at low-millisecond end-to-end latency. On the 630-scenario benchmark, evaluated under a patched ruleset and not claimed as zero-shot, AgentTrust achieves 96.7% verdict accuracy, including about 93% on shell-obfuscated payloads. AgentTrust is released under the AGPL-3.0 license and provides a Model Context Protocol server for MCP-compatible agents.

Misaligned by Reward: Socially Undesirable Preferences in LLMs

High 2605.05003
Gayane Ghazaryan, Esra Dönmez
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：奖励模型在多个社会敏感领域偏好不良选项，标准基准不足以评估社会对齐。
🎯研究动机

奖励模型是 LLM 对齐的关键，但现有评估主要关注指令遵循，忽略了社会偏好，可能导致社会对齐失败。

❓解决问题

评估奖励模型是否偏好社会不良响应，以及其偏好是否导致系统偏差。

🔎现象分析

奖励模型在社会领域偏好不良选项，且偏好分布存在系统偏差；更强的去偏可能降低上下文敏感性，揭示对齐权衡。

🛠️主要方法

将社会评估数据集转换为成对偏好数据，利用金标签或方向性偏差指标，测试奖励模型是否偏好社会不良响应。

📊实验结果

在 5 个公开奖励模型和 2 个指令微调模型上评估，发现模型偏好存在领域差异，无单一模型全面最优。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出评估奖励模型社会偏好的框架，覆盖偏见、安全、道德和伦理推理四个领域。
  • 发现现有奖励模型在社会智能方面不足，偏好存在系统偏差，并揭示去偏与上下文保真度之间的权衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了有限数量的模型和领域。
  • 未探讨如何改进奖励模型以缓解社会偏好问题。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reward models are a key component of large language model alignment, serving as proxies for human preferences during training. However, existing evaluations focus primarily on broad instruction-following benchmarks, providing limited insight into whether these models capture socially desirable preferences. As a result, important failures in social alignment can remain hidden. We extend reward-model benchmarking to four socially consequential domains: bias, safety, morality, and ethical reasoning. We introduce a framework that converts social evaluation datasets into pairwise preference data, leveraging gold labels where available and directional bias indicators otherwise. This enables us to test whether reward models prefer socially undesirable responses, and whether their preferences produce systematically biased distributions over selected outputs. Across five publicly available reward models and two instruction-tuned models used as reward proxies, we find substantial variation across domains, with no single model performing best overall. The models fall well short of strong social intelligence: they often prefer socially undesirable options, and their preferences produce systematically biased distributions. Moreover, stronger bias avoidance can reduce sensitivity to context, revealing a key alignment trade-off between avoiding biased outcomes and preserving contextual faithfulness. These findings show that standard reward benchmarks are insufficient for assessing social alignment and highlight the need for evaluations that directly measure the social preferences encoded in reward models.

SoK: Robustness in Large Language Models against Jailbreak Attacks

High 2605.05058
Feiyue Xu, Hongsheng Hu, Chaoxiang He, Sheng Hang, Hanqing Hu, Xiuming Liu, Yubo Zhao, Zhengyan Zhou et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：系统综述 LLM 越狱攻击与防御，提出统一评估框架 Security Cube。
🎯研究动机

LLM 易受越狱攻击，现有评估方法单一，缺乏系统性比较，亟需统一框架。

❓解决问题

如何系统分类、评估并提升 LLM 对越狱攻击的鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

现有评估依赖攻击成功率等窄指标，无法全面反映安全维度。

🛠️主要方法

提出 Security Cube 多维评估框架，对 13 种攻击和 5 种防御进行基准测试。

📊实验结果

对 13 种攻击和 5 种防御进行基准测试，摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统分类越狱攻击与防御方法
  • 提出 Security Cube 统一评估框架
  • 基准测试揭示当前攻防现状与开放挑战
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验覆盖的防御方法有限
  • 框架可能未涵盖所有新兴攻击
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success but remain highly susceptible to jailbreak attacks, in which adversarial prompts coerce models into generating harmful, unethical, or policy-violating outputs. Such attacks pose real-world risks, eroding safety, trust, and regulatory compliance in high-stakes applications. Although a variety of attack and defense methods have been proposed, existing evaluation practices are inadequate, often relying on narrow metrics like attack success rate that fail to capture the multidimensional nature of LLM security. In this paper, we present a systematic taxonomy of jailbreak attacks and defenses and introduce Security Cube, a unified, multi-dimensional framework for comprehensive evaluation of these techniques. We provide detailed comparison tables of existing attacks and defenses, highlighting key insights and open challenges across the literature. Leveraging Security Cube, we conduct benchmark studies on 13 representative attacks and 5 defenses, establishing a clear view of the current landscape encompassing jailbreak attacks, defenses, automated judges, and LLM vulnerabilities. Based on these evaluations, we distill critical findings, identify unresolved problems, and outline promising research directions for enhancing LLM robustness against jailbreak attacks. Our analysis aims to pave the way towards more robust, interpretable, and trustworthy LLM systems. Our code is available at Code.

LLMs Uncertainty Quantification via Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy

High 2605.04295
Hamed Karimi, Vaishali Meyappan, Reza Samavi
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE）方法，通过聚类语义熵和共形校准实现 LLM 不确定性量化，在 TriviaQA 上 AUROC 达 0.88。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在安全关键场景中常过度自信（如幻觉），现有不确定性量化方法多基于词法或概率度量，忽略了语义相似但表达不同的响应间的语义方差。

❓解决问题

如何可靠地估计 LLM 在提示级别的不确定性，并保证统计可靠性（如有限样本、分布自由的误差控制）。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出自适应共形语义熵（ACSE），先对同一提示的多个响应进行语义聚类，基于每个聚类的语义特征自适应调整不确定性分数，再通过共形校准得到接受 / 弃权的决策规则，保证接受响应的错误率在用户指定容忍度内。

📊实验结果

在多个 LLM 和数据集上评估，与 SOTA 基线比较，使用判别性能、共形保证和概率校准指标。TriviaQA 上 AUROC 为 0.88，而 token 熵方法为 0.65。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 ACSE 方法，利用语义聚类和自适应调整实现提示级不确定性量化。
  • 引入共形校准提供有限样本、分布自由的统计保证。
  • 实验表明 ACSE 在判别性能、共形保证和概率校准上优于现有基线。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖语义聚类的质量，对聚类算法敏感。
  • 共形校准需要校准集，可能增加计算开销。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

LLMs' overconfidence, particularly when hallucinating, poses a significant challenge for the deployment of the models in safety-critical settings and makes a reliable estimation of uncertainty necessary. Existing approaches for uncertainty quantification typically prioritize lexical or probabilistic measures; however, these techniques often ignore the semantic variance of different responses with similar meaning. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Conformal Semantic Entropy (ACSE), a method for estimating prompt-level uncertainty by adaptively measuring semantic dispersion in LLMs outputs. Our uncertainty scoring function is based on clustering semantic entropy of multiple diverse responses to the same prompt. The function adaptively adjusts the uncertainty score based on semantic features of each cluster. To ensure statistical reliability of our score, we use conformal calibration to apply a decision rule to accept/abstain the prompts, providing a finite-sample, distribution-free guarantee such that the error rate among the accepted responses remains bounded by a user-specified tolerance. Our extensive experimental evaluations using different LLMs and datasets, demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification baselines using discriminative performance, conformal guarantees, and probabilistic calibration indicators. As a highlight, for TriviaQA dataset, AUROC of our approach is 0.88 compared to 0.65 produced by the token entropy approach.

Efficiently Aligning Language Models with Online Natural Language Feedback

High 2605.04356
Christine Ye, Joe Benton
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出在线自然语言反馈方法，通过迭代优化代理奖励模型，在模糊领域以更少专家样本高效对齐语言模型。
🎯研究动机

现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习在模糊、难以监督的领域（如创意写作）中难以应用，因为专家监督成本高且难以规模化。

❓解决问题

如何在模糊领域中使用少量专家在线自然语言反馈，高效地对齐语言模型。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

迭代优化代理奖励信号，在过优化点停止并收集新专家反馈更新代理奖励；代理奖励模型通过上下文学习或微调从语言模型构建。

📊实验结果

在 Qwen3-8B（创意写作）和 Haiku 4.5（对齐研究）上测试，上下文学习方法用 50 倍 /30 倍更少样本恢复 35% 性能，微调方法用 20 倍 /10 倍更少样本恢复 80-100% 性能。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种利用在线自然语言反馈对齐语言模型的迭代框架，显著降低专家监督成本。
  • 在创意写作和对齐研究两个模糊领域验证了方法，展示了高达 20-50 倍的数据效率提升。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖专家在线反馈，可能仍需要一定量的专家参与。
  • 代理奖励模型的过优化点检测可能不鲁棒，需要进一步研究。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards has been used to elicit impressive performance from language models in many domains. But, broadly beneficial deployments of AI may require us to train models with strong capabilities in "fuzzy", hard-to-supervise domains. In this paper, we develop methods to align language models in fuzzy domains where human experts are still able to provide high-quality supervision signal, but only for a small number of model outputs, using online natural language feedback. Specifically, we train models by iteratively optimizing against proxy reward signals, stopping at the point of over-optimization, collecting fresh expert supervision, and updating the proxy reward. We construct proxy reward models from language models using in-context learning (ICL) and fine-tuning. We test our methods by eliciting creative writing and alignment research capabilities in Qwen3-8B and Haiku 4.5 respectively. For Qwen3-8B, ICL methods recover up to 35% of performance with 50x fewer expert samples, while fine-tuning methods recover 80% with up to 20x fewer samples and 100% with 3x fewer samples. For Haiku 4.5, ICL methods recover up to 35% of performance with 30x fewer samples, and fine-tuning methods recover 100% with 10x fewer samples. Our results suggest that online natural language feedback can substantially improve the data efficiency of expert supervision.

How Does Thinking Mode Change LLM Moral Judgments? A Controlled Instant-vs-Thinking Comparison Across Five Frontier Models

Medium 2605.04488
Sai Sourabh Madur
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：推理模式不会显著改变 LLM 的道德判断整体一致性，但能缩小争议场景下的模型间分歧并降低人口统计不一致性。
🎯研究动机

LLM 在道德判断任务中可能表现出不一致性，而推理模式（thinking mode）是否以及如何影响其道德判断尚不清楚，这对 AI 安全和对齐至关重要。

❓解决问题

探究同一模型检查点下，启用推理模式与即时模式相比，如何改变 LLM 的道德判断。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在 100 个道德判断场景和五个前沿推理型 LLM 上，比较即时模式与推理模式的二元判决一致性、跨模型分歧、人口统计不一致性以及自我标签伦理框架的变化。

📊实验结果

在 100 个道德判断场景和五个模型（Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, Qwen3.5 397B）上进行实验，使用 Krippendorff's alpha 和平均成对一致性等指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现推理模式不显著改变整体道德判断一致性，但能缩小争议场景下的跨模型分歧。
  • 揭示推理模式在部分模型中减少人口统计不一致性，且更频繁地改变自我标签的伦理框架而非二元判决。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅评估了五个模型，可能不适用于其他模型或架构。
  • 道德判断场景有限，可能无法覆盖所有道德维度。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We evaluate whether enabling provider-exposed reasoning mode changes moral judgments within the same model checkpoint. Across 100 moral-judgment scenarios and five frontier reasoning-trained LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3 Flash, DeepSeek V3.1, and Qwen3.5 397B), aggregate binary-verdict agreement remains high and statistically indistinguishable between instant and thinking modes (Krippendorff's alpha = 0.78 vs. 0.79). However, disagreement is concentrated in 21 model-disputed scenarios, where instant-mode agreement is near chance (alpha = 0.08). On these scenarios, reasoning directionally narrows cross-model disagreement, increasing mean pairwise agreement from 5.4 to 6.7 out of 10. Reasoning also reduces demographic-judgment inconsistency in three of five models and does not increase it for any model. Across all five model families, reasoning changes self-labeled ethical frameworks more often than binary verdicts.

Accountable Agents in Software Engineering: An Analysis of Terms of Service and a Research Roadmap

Medium 2605.04532
Christoph Treude
arXiv PDF cs.SE
TL;DR：分析 AI 编码助手的服务条款，揭示责任分配问题，并提出软件工程中可问责代理的研究路线图。
🎯研究动机

AI 编码助手和自主代理正重塑软件开发，但现有研究主要关注能力和生产力，忽视了问责性：当代理生成、修改或推荐代码时，谁负责？

❓解决问题

服务条款（ToS）如何分配 AI 编码工具的所有权、责任、义务和披露义务，以及这些条款是否适应日益代理化的软件开发流程。

🔎现象分析

分析显示，服务条款普遍将正确性、安全性和法律合规责任转移给用户，且不同提供商在赔偿、数据重用和可接受使用等问题上存在显著差异。

🛠️主要方法

对广泛使用的 AI 编码助手和代理开发工具的服务条款进行比较分析，识别责任分配模式与差异。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次对 AI 编码工具的服务条款进行系统比较分析，揭示责任转移趋势和提供商间的差异。
  • 提出软件工程中可问责代理的研究路线图，涵盖责任建模、治理工件设计、支持问责的工具开发以及开发者感知与实践的实证研究。
⚠️方法局限
  • 分析仅限于服务条款文本，未涉及实际法律案例或开发者实践。
  • 研究路线图尚未经过实证验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI coding assistants and autonomous agents are becoming integral to software development workflows, reshaping how code is produced, reviewed, and maintained. While recent research has focused mainly on the capabilities and impacts of productivity of these systems, much less attention has been paid to accountability: who is responsible when agents generate, modify, or recommend code? In practice, accountability is defined through the Terms of Service (ToS) and related policy documents that govern the use of AI-powered development tools. In this vision paper, we present a comparative analysis of the Terms of Service for widely used AI coding assistants and agent-enabled development tools. We examine how these documents allocate ownership, responsibility, liability, and disclosure obligations between tool providers and software developers, and we identify common patterns and divergences between providers. Our analysis reveals a consistent tendency to shift responsibility for correctness, safety, and legal compliance onto users, as well as substantial variation in how providers address issues such as indemnification, data reuse, and acceptable use. Based on these findings, we argue that existing policy frameworks are poorly aligned with increasingly agent-mediated and autonomous software development workflows. We outline a research roadmap for accountable agents in software engineering, identifying challenges and opportunities for modeling responsibility, designing governance artifacts, developing tooling that supports accountability, and conducting empirical studies of developers' perceptions and practices.

Undetectable Backdoors in Model Parameters: Hiding Sparse Secrets in High Dimensions

Medium 2605.04209
Sarthak Choudhary, Atharv Singh Patlan, Nils Palumbo, Ashish Hooda, Kassem Fawaz, Somesh Jha
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：提出一种在预训练图像分类器参数中植入计算不可区分后门的攻击方法。
🎯研究动机

现有后门攻击通常可被检测，缺乏理论上的不可检测性保证，供应链安全面临威胁。

❓解决问题

如何在模型参数中植入后门，使得任何概率多项式时间区分器都无法将其与干净参考分布区分开。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在预训练分类器的全连接层中沿随机方向注入结构化稀疏扰动，并用独立各向同性高斯抖动掩盖，使抖动后的参考分布与原始分类器功能等价，且区分后门模型与参考分布至少与稀疏 PCA 检测一样困难。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出一种可证明不可检测的后门攻击方法，基于稀疏 PCA 的困难性假设。
  • 证明了抖动参考分布与原始分类器功能等价，并给出了理论保证。
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击仅针对全连接层，可能不适用于其他层类型。
  • 依赖预训练分类器的边际条件，可能限制适用范围。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present Sparse Backdoor, a supply-chain attack that plants a \emph{provably undetectable} backdoor in pre-trained image classifiers, including convolutional networks and Vision Transformers. The attack injects a structured sparse perturbation along a randomly chosen direction into a small subset of columns at each fully connected layer, propagating a trigger signal to an adversary-chosen target class, and masks the perturbation with an independent isotropic Gaussian dither. The dither serves a single technical purpose: it induces a clean reference distribution anchored at the pre-trained weights, against which undetectability can be formalized. Under a mild margin condition on the pre-trained classifier, we show that the dithered reference is functionally equivalent to the original classifier. We prove that distinguishing the backdoor-injected model from this reference is at least as hard as Sparse PCA detection, which is computationally infeasible under standard hardness assumptions. The guarantee holds against any probabilistic polynomial-time distinguisher with white-box access to the parameters.

Evaluating Patient Safety Risks in Generative AI: Development and Validation of a FMECA Framework for Generated Clinical Content

Medium 2605.04085
Lydie Bednarczyk, Jamil Zaghir, Julien Ehrsam, Maria Tcherepanova, Christian Skalafouris, Karim Gariani, Catherine Geslin, Claire-Bénédicte Rivara et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：提出并验证了首个基于 FMECA 的框架，用于系统评估 LLM 生成临床摘要的患者安全风险。
🎯研究动机

LLM 越来越多用于临床文本摘要，但缺乏结构化方法来评估相关的患者安全风险；现有 FMECA 方法未被应用于 LLM 生成内容。

❓解决问题

如何系统性地识别和评估 LLM 生成临床摘要中的患者安全风险。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

开发了一个包含 14 种失效模式的 FMECA 框架，由跨学科专家小组通过文献综述和头脑风暴构建，并应用于 4 名患者的 36 份出院摘要，由评审者独立标注两轮。

📊实验结果

在 36 份由 GPT-OSS 120B 生成的出院摘要上进行了两轮标注，评估了评分者间信度和可用性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次将 FMECA 框架应用于 LLM 生成临床内容的风险评估。
  • 验证了框架的可靠性（评分者间一致性中等至显著）和可用性（SUS 评分 79.2/100）。
⚠️方法局限
  • 样本量较小（4 名患者，36 份摘要），可能限制泛化性。
  • 仅使用单一开源 LLM，未涵盖其他模型。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Objectives: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for clinical text summarization, yet structured methods to assess associated patient safety risks remain limited. Failure Mode, Effects, and Criticality Analysis (FMECA) provides a proactive framework for systematic risk identification but has not been adapted to LLM-generated clinical content. This study aimed to develop and validate a novel FMECA framework for the prospective assessment of patient safety risks in LLM-generated clinical summaries. Materials and Methods: An interdisciplinary expert panel (n = 8) developed a taxonomy of failure modes through literature review and brainstorming. Standard FMECA dimensions (occurrence, severity, detectability) were adapted into 5-point ordinal scales. The framework was applied to 36 discharge summaries from four patients, generated by an open LLM (GPT-OSS 120B) using real-world clinical data from the Geneva University Hospitals. Reviewers independently annotated the summaries across two rounds. Inter-rater reliability was assessed at failure mode, severity and detectability score levels. Usability and content validity were evaluated using an adapted System Usability Scale and structured feedback. Results: The final framework comprised 14 failure modes organized into categories. Inter-rater agreement improved between rounds, reaching moderate-to-substantial agreement for failure mode identification and good agreement for severity and detectability scoring. Usability was rated as good (mean SUS: 79.2/100), with high evaluator confidence. Discussion and Conclusion: This study presents the first FMECA-based framework for systematic patient safety risk assessment of LLM-generated clinical summaries. The framework provides a structured and reproducible method for identifying clinically relevant risks caused by these summaries.

AsymmetryZero: A Framework for Operationalizing Human Expert Preferences as Semantic Evals

Medium 2605.04083
Tadhg Looram, Lucas Nuzzi, Kyle Waters, Steven Dillmann
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 AsymmetryZero 框架，将人类专家偏好操作化为语义评估，通过评估合约实现可复现的模型评估。
🎯研究动机

当前 RL 评估依赖精确匹配或开放偏好判断，难以编码主观、程序化、领域特定的任务需求，亟需一种能忠实编码专家要求的评估框架。

❓解决问题

如何将人类专家偏好系统性地转化为可执行的语义评估，并保证评估的稳定性、可比性和可审计性。

🔎现象分析

紧凑型陪审团（compact jury）内部异议率（28.7%-32.4%）远高于前沿模型陪审团（6.1%-11.5%），但任务级结果相对稳定；紧凑型陪审团成本降至前沿的 4.2%-5.6%，延迟降至 21.7%-27.1%。

🛠️主要方法

AsymmetryZero 框架：将每个任务表示为稳定评估合约，明确评分标准、判断方式和聚合规则；合约可在 Inspect（纯模型评估）和 Harbor（智能体评估）中执行，支持跨设置可比分数和共享审计痕迹。

📊实验结果

使用 Harbor 框架，固定任务合约，比较五模型前沿陪审团（Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Grok-4.20, Gemini-3.1-Pro）与五模型紧凑陪审团在四个前沿求解器上的表现，报告了标准级一致率、内部异议率及成本延迟指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 AsymmetryZero 框架，将人类专家偏好操作化为语义评估合约，实现评估的显式化、可复现和可审计。
  • 通过实验比较前沿模型陪审团与紧凑型陪审团，揭示紧凑型陪审团在成本、延迟和内部一致性上的权衡。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅涉及五个模型和四个求解器，泛化性有待验证。
  • 紧凑型陪审团的高内部异议率可能影响评估可靠性，需进一步研究聚合策略。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Much of the focus in RL today is on evaluation design: building meaningful evals that serve simultaneously as benchmarks and as well-defined reward signals for post-training. Yet, many real-world tasks are governed by subjective, procedural, and domain-specific requirements that are difficult to encode as exact-match targets or open-ended preference judgments frequently used in RL pipelines today. In this work, we present AsymmetryZero, a framework for operationalizing human expert preferences as semantic evals. AsymmetryZero represents each task as a stable evaluation contract that makes grading criteria explicit: what is being graded, how each criterion is judged, and how criterion-level decisions are aggregated into a task outcome. The same contract can be executed using Inspect for model-only evaluations, as well as the Harbor Framework for agentic evaluations, enabling comparable scores and shared audit artifacts across both settings. We argue that the central challenge in post-training today is the faithful encoding of expert requirements into the evaluation itself. To that end, we present a study using Harbor that holds task contracts fixed and compares a five-model frontier jury against a five-model compact jury across four frontier-class solvers (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-5.4, Grok-4.20, Gemini-3.1-Pro). We find that criterion-level frontier-vs-compact agreement ranges from $75.9\%$ to $89.6\%$ (strict common-subset agreement: $77.8\%$ to $92.1\%$), while compact juries exhibit substantially higher internal dissent (3--2 split rate $28.7\%$--$32.4\%$) than frontier juries ($6.1\%$--$11.5\%$). Verifier traces further show that compact juries reduce per-criterion judging cost to roughly $4.2\%$--$5.6\%$ of frontier and latency to roughly $21.7\%$--$27.1\%$, even as aggregated task-level outcomes often remain comparatively stable.

公平性与偏见 5 篇

Mitigating Label Shift in Tabular In-Context Learning via Test-Time Posterior Adjustment

Medium 2605.04363
Seunghan Lee, Jaehoon Lee, Jun Seo, Sungdong Yoo, Minjae Kim, Tae Yoon Lim, Dongwan Kang, Hwanil Choi et al.
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出 DistPFN，通过测试时后验调整缓解表格上下文学习中的标签偏移问题。
🎯研究动机

TabPFN 作为表格数据的基础模型，在上下文学习中易受标签偏移影响，过度拟合训练数据中的多数类，限制了其在真实场景中的泛化能力。

❓解决问题

解决 TabPFN 在标签偏移下分类性能下降的问题。

🔎现象分析

TabPFN 在标签偏移场景下会过度依赖训练先验（上下文类别分布），导致对多数类过拟合。

🛠️主要方法

DistPFN 通过重新缩放预测概率，降低训练先验的影响并强调模型预测后验的贡献，无需修改架构或额外训练；DistPFN-T 引入温度缩放，根据先验与后验差异自适应调整强度。

📊实验结果

在超过 250 个 OpenML 数据集上评估，展示了 TabPFN 系列模型在分类任务中标签偏移下的性能提升，标准设置下性能未下降。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出针对表格基础模型的测试时后验调整方法 DistPFN，缓解标签偏移。
  • 引入 DistPFN-T，通过温度缩放自适应控制调整强度。
  • 在 250 多个 OpenML 数据集上验证了方法在标签偏移下的显著改进，且标准设置下性能保持。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法依赖模型预测的后验质量，若后验不准确可能影响效果。
  • 温度缩放参数需要验证集或启发式选择，可能增加调参成本。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

TabPFN has recently gained attention as a foundation model for tabular datasets, achieving strong performance by leveraging in-context learning on synthetic data. However, we find that TabPFN is vulnerable to label shift, often overfitting to the majority class in the training dataset. To address this limitation, we propose DistPFN, the first test-time posterior adjustment method designed for tabular foundation models. DistPFN rescales predicted class probabilities by downweighting the influence of the training prior (i.e., the class distribution of the context) and emphasizing the contribution of the model's predicted posterior, without architectural modification or additional training. We further introduce DistPFN-T, which incorporates temperature scaling to adaptively control the adjustment strength based on the discrepancy between prior and posterior. We evaluate our methods on over 250 OpenML datasets, demonstrating substantial improvements for various TabPFN-based models in classification tasks under label shift, while maintaining strong performance in standard settings without label shift. Code is available at this repository: this https URL .

A Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection in U.S. Banking: Integrating OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN Compliance Requirements for Model Development, Validation, and Monitoring Lifecycles

Medium 2605.04076
Mohammad Nasir Uddin
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出一个整合美国四大监管框架的 AI 金融欺诈检测治理框架，并通过实证验证其有效性。
🎯研究动机

美国金融机构在部署基于 AI 的欺诈检测时面临碎片化的合规环境，缺乏统一的治理生命周期来连接监管要求与模型开发、验证和监控实践。

❓解决问题

如何设计一个集成 OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB 和 FinCEN 合规要求的治理框架，以指导 AI 欺诈检测模型的开发、验证和监控全生命周期。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出三层次治理架构 RGF-AFFD，包括基准测试六种架构（如 LSTM+XGBoost 集成）、消融、时间漂移、SHAP 可解释性和 BISG 公平性分析，并引入 RDT-FG 监管数字孪生元模型将指标转化为四个监管机构特定的健康评分和综合监管适应性指数。

📊实验结果

使用 IEEE-CIS 数据集（590,540 笔交易）和 ULB 基准（284,807 笔交易），对六种架构进行基准测试，包括 LSTM+XGBoost 集成，并进行了消融、时间漂移、SHAP 可解释性和 BISG 公平性分析。LSTM+XGBoost 集成达到 ROC-AUC 0.9289（F1: 0.6360），收益成本比 6:1。XGBoost 表现出最强的时间稳定性（delta-AUC = -0.0017，而 LSTM 为 -0.0626）。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出同时满足 OCC、SR 11-7、CFPB 和 FinCEN 要求的集成部署蓝图。
  • 通过两个数据集和多种分析（包括时间漂移、可解释性、公平性）实证验证了框架的有效性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架可能主要针对美国监管环境，其他国家的适用性需进一步验证。
  • 社区银行实施案例可能无法完全代表大型金融机构的复杂性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

U.S. financial institutions deploying AI-based fraud detection face a fragmented compliance landscape spanning four regulatory frameworks -- OCC Bulletin 2011-12, SR 11-7, the CFPB AI circular, and FinCEN BSA/SAR requirements -- with no integrated governance life cycle connecting these requirements to model development, validation, and monitoring practice. This paper presents the Regulatory Governance Framework for AI-Driven Financial Fraud Detection (RGF-AFFD), a three-tier governance architecture empirically anchored in a multi-study empirical program. Using the IEEE-CIS dataset (590,540 transactions) and ULB benchmark (284,807 transactions), we benchmark six architectures including an LSTM+XGBoost ensemble, and conduct ablation, temporal drift, SHAP interpretability, and BISG fairness analyses. The LSTM+XGBoost ensemble achieves ROC-AUC of 0.9289 (F1: 0.6360) with a benefit-cost ratio of 6:1. XGBoost demonstrates the strongest temporal stability (delta-AUC = -0.0017 versus -0.0626 for LSTM). The RDT-FG Regulatory Digital Twin meta-model translates metrics into four regulator-specific health scores and a composite Regulatory Fitness Index for continuous compliance monitoring. The RGF-AFFD is the first integrated deployment blueprint to simultaneously satisfy OCC, SR 11-7, CFPB, and FinCEN requirements, supported by a community bank implementation vignette and four evidence-based policy recommendations.

Connecting online criminal behavior with machine learning: Using authorship attribution to analyze and link potential online traffickers

Medium 2605.04080
Vageesh Kumar Saxena
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：利用作者归属分析技术，通过写作和图像模式关联在线非法广告，辅助打击人口贩卖等犯罪。
🎯研究动机

在线犯罪活动（如人口贩卖）中，罪犯使用匿名账户和频繁更换身份，使得执法部门难以追踪网络规模和关联不同账户，亟需数据驱动的方法来揭示隐藏的犯罪网络。

❓解决问题

如何通过机器学习方法，从在线广告中分析并关联潜在的犯罪者身份，同时确保方法的伦理合规性。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，即使试图匿名，人们在撰写广告和呈现图像时仍会保持一致的风格模式，这为关联不同账户提供了可分析的线索。

🛠️主要方法

采用作者归属分析（authorship attribution）技术，结合文本和图像模式分析，对大规模在线广告进行关联和重复行为识别。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出利用写作和图像模式关联匿名在线广告账户的方法，以揭示非法网络。
  • 制定了负责任使用这些技术的指南，确保隐私、公平和透明度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 方法可能受限于广告文本长度和图像质量，影响模式提取的准确性。
  • 伦理指南的实际执行效果和执法应用中的潜在偏见未在摘要中讨论。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

This research investigated how online criminal activities can be better understood and connected using data-driven machine learning methods. Many illegal activities, such as human trafficking and illicit trade, have moved to online platforms where offenders hide behind anonymous accounts and frequently change identities. This makes it difficult for authorities to understand how large these networks are and how different online profiles may be linked. The research shows that people tend to maintain consistent patterns in how they write advertisements and present images online, even when they try to stay anonymous. By analysing these patterns across large collections of online advertisements, the research demonstrates how to link related accounts and identify repeated behaviour across illegal online markets. In addition, the research also addresses how such methods should be used responsibly. It proposes clear guidelines to ensure that privacy, fairness, and transparency are respected when these tools are applied. Overall, the research provides practical ways to support law enforcement investigations while emphasising careful and ethical use.

Confronting Label Indeterminacy in Automated Bail Decisions

Medium 2605.04073
Cor Steging, Tadeusz Zbiegień
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：保释决策中的标签不确定性问题导致数据驱动系统存在偏差和反馈循环，不同处理方法对模型行为影响显著。
🎯研究动机

保释决策中，拒绝保释的被告的后续出庭情况无法观测，导致历史数据存在结构性标签不确定性，基于此类数据构建的自动化系统可能引入偏差并强化反馈循环，亟需研究如何处理这些不确定标签。

❓解决问题

如何应对保释决策数据中因拒绝保释而导致的标签不确定性问题，并评估不同处理方法对机器学习模型预测行为的影响。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

在宾夕法尼亚州统一司法系统的保释决策案例研究中，评估了五种处理标签不确定性的方法（包括一种基于保释决策动态的新颖标签插补方法），并应用于三种机器学习模型。

📊实验结果

在宾夕法尼亚州统一司法系统的保释决策数据上进行了案例研究，评估了五种方法在三种机器学习模型上的表现。摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统评估了五种处理标签不确定性的方法对保释决策模型的影响，发现方法选择有时比模型选择影响更大。
  • 通过可解释 AI 分析揭示了不同方法对模型内部决策过程的影响。
  • 从法律视角审视了这些方法在保释决策中的合法性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 每种方法都依赖于不可验证的假设。
  • 研究仅基于单一司法系统的数据，可能缺乏泛化性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Bail decisions present a fundamental challenge for data-driven decision support systems. When bail is denied, the counterfactual outcome of whether the defendant would have appeared in court remains unobserved. As a result, historical bail data embed structural label indeterminacy: future decisions are influenced by past decisions whose outcomes are only partially knowable. Building automated systems on such data risks introducing bias and reinforcing feedback loops. This raises a core question for machine-learning systems intended to assist judicial actors: how should cases in which bail was denied be treated during model development? In a case study of bail decisions from the Unified Judicial System of Pennsylvania, we evaluate five contemporary approaches to handling label indeterminacy across three machine learning models, including a novel label imputation method motivated by the dynamics of bail decisions. Each method relies on unverifiable assumptions, yet all influence the models' predictive behaviour, sometimes even more so than the choice of model itself. Explainable AI analysis further reveals that these effects extend to the models' internal decision-making processes as well. Finally, we consider the notion of label indeterminacy from a legal perspective and assess the legitimacy of these approaches in the context of bail decision-making.

Investigating Trustworthiness of Nonparametric Deep Survival Models for Alzheimer's Disease Progression Analysis

Medium 2605.04063
Jacob Thrasher, Kaitlyn Heintzelman, Peter Martone, David Kotlowski, Binod Bhattarai, Donald Adjeroh, Prashnna Gyawali
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：研究阿尔茨海默病非参数深度生存模型的公平性，发现模型存在显著偏见。
🎯研究动机

阿尔茨海默病进展建模对患者护理至关重要，但现有深度学习生存模型在 AD 领域缺乏公平性研究，可能对边缘群体产生不公平预测。

❓解决问题

评估非参数深度生存模型在 AD 进展分析中的可信度，特别是公平性和特征重要性。

🔎现象分析

深度学习生存模型在 AD 预测中表现鲁棒，但常表现出显著偏见，需进一步研究。

🛠️主要方法

提出两个新公平性指标：时间依赖一致性杂质和 Kaplan-Meier 公平性，用于量化对性别、种族、教育等敏感属性的偏见，并进行特征重要性研究。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次对 AD 进展分析中的深度生存模型进行严格的公平性研究。
  • 提出两个新的公平性指标用于非参数生存模型。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅针对非参数生存模型，可能不适用于参数模型。
  • 公平性指标可能依赖特定数据集。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Alzheimer's Dementia (AD) is a progressive neurodegenerative disease marked by irreversible decline, making reliable modeling of its progression essential for effective patient care. Progression-aware methods such as survival analysis are therefore crucial tools for the early detection and monitoring of AD. Recent advancements in deep learning have demonstrated remarkable performance in survival tasks, but alarmingly fewer studies have been conducted in the domain of AD. Further, the studies that do exist do not consider learned bias within the model itself, which could result in unfair and unreliable predictions toward certain marginalized groups. As such, we conduct a rigorous study of fairness in AD progression analysis along with a thorough feature importance study to determine the characteristics which are most important for reliable AD predictions. Furthermore, we propose two novel fairness metrics, called Time-Dependent Concordance Impurity and Kaplan-Meier Fairness, to quantify bias with respect to sensitive attributes such as sex, race, and education in nonparametric survival models. Our study demonstrates that while deep learning powered survival models are robust tools which can aid clinicians in AD care decisions, they often exhibit considerable bias, representing important avenues for future research.

幻觉与事实性 5 篇

Text Corpora as Concept Fields: Black-Box Hallucination and Novelty Measurement

High 2605.05103
Nicholas S. Kersting, Vittorio Castelli, Chieh Ting Yeh, Xinzhu Wang, Saad Taame
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出文本语料的概念场（Concept Field）用于黑盒幻觉检测和新颖性评估，无需模型内部信息。
🎯研究动机

现有幻觉检测方法多依赖模型内部信息或检索基线，缺乏轻量、可解释且跨领域稳定的黑盒方案。

❓解决问题

如何在不访问模型内部结构的情况下，利用文本语料本身检测生成内容的幻觉（groundedness）和新颖性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

定义文本语料的概念场：在句子嵌入空间中，基于连续句子间的 delta 估计局部漂移场，并引入向量序列数据库（VSDB）存储嵌入及序列位置信息；通过ζ分数（观测 delta 与局部高斯估计的绝对 z 距离）评估候选句子转换与场的一致性。

📊实验结果

在两个大规模场景上评估：美国联邦法规的幻觉式 groundedness 检测和古腾堡项目的新颖性检测。在受控 LLM 生成改写上，概念场在 grounded/ungrounded/unsure 三分类策略下实现了强选择性分类性能。与检索基线相比，覆盖 - 风险行为在领域间相似。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出概念场（Concept Field）用于黑盒幻觉和新颖性检测，具有可解释性和跨领域稳定性。
  • 引入向量序列数据库（VSDB）支持高效计算。
  • 在联邦法规和古腾堡项目上验证了方法的有效性，并展示了概念场的散度和旋度可揭示语义模式。
⚠️方法局限
  • 散度和旋度的语义模式分析仅为假设生成性质，非定量结果。
  • 方法依赖句子嵌入质量，可能受嵌入空间偏差影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce the \textbf{Concept Field} of a text corpus: a local drift field with pointwise uncertainty, estimated in sentence-embedding space from the deltas between consecutive sentences. Given a candidate sentence transition, we score its agreement with the field by $\zeta$, the mean absolute z-distance between the observed delta and the field's local Gaussian estimate. The score is black-box (no model internals), corpus-attributable (every score traces to nearby corpus sentences), and admits a probabilistically motivated interpretation under a local Gaussian approximation. We support the computation with the introduction of a \textbf{Vector Sequence Database (VSDB)} that stores embeddings together with sequence-position and next-delta metadata. We evaluate this approach on two large-scale settings: hallucination-style groundedness detection over the U.S. Code of Federal Regulations, and novelty detection over Project Gutenberg. On controlled LLM-generated rewrites, Concept Fields achieve strong selective classification performance under a grounded / ungrounded / unsure triage policy. Unlike retrieval-centric baselines, the resulting coverage-risk behavior is similar across both domains, supporting a degree of cross-domain stability for the standardized deviation score. We also sketch how divergence and curl of the Concept Field, computed on dense clusters, surface qualitatively meaningful semantic patterns (logic sources, sinks, and implicit topics), which we offer as hypothesis-generating rather than as a quantitative result. Concept Fields provide a fast, lightweight, and interpretable signal for groundedness and novelty, complementary to LLM-as-judge and white-box detectors.

Gradients with Respect to Semantics Preserving Embeddings Tell the Uncertainty of Large Language Models

High 2605.04638
Mingda Li, Rundong Lv, Xinyu Li, Weinan Zhang, Ting Liu
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出首个基于梯度的无采样不确定性量化方法 SemGrad，通过语义空间梯度高效评估 LLM 置信度。
🎯研究动机

LLM 存在幻觉问题，不确定性量化（UQ）是确保其可信度的关键技术，但现有最先进的 UQ 方法依赖采样，计算成本高且方差大。

❓解决问题

如何在不依赖采样的前提下，高效且准确地量化 LLM 在自由生成任务中的不确定性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SemGrad 方法，通过语义保持嵌入的梯度来评估 LLM 的稳定性；引入语义保持分数（SPS）选择最佳语义嵌入；进一步提出 HybridGrad 结合语义梯度和参数梯度。

📊实验结果

实验表明，所提方法在多个设置下优于现有最先进方法，尤其在存在多个有效响应的场景中。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首个针对自由生成任务的基于梯度的无采样 UQ 方法 SemGrad。
  • 提出语义空间梯度概念及语义保持分数（SPS），并设计 HybridGrad 融合参数梯度。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能依赖语义嵌入的质量，对复杂语义理解有限。
  • 未在极大规模模型上验证计算效率。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is an important technique for ensuring the trustworthiness of LLMs, given their tendency to hallucinate. Existing state-of-the-art UQ approaches for free-form generation rely heavily on sampling, which incurs high computational cost and variance. In this work, we propose the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, SemGrad, which is sampling-free and computationally efficient. Unlike prior gradient-based methods developed for classification tasks that operates in parameter space, we propose to consider gradients in semantic space. Our method builds on the key intuition that a confident LLM should maintain stable output distributions under semantically equivalent input perturbations. We interpret the stability as the gradients in semantic space and introduce a Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to identify embeddings that best capture semantics, with respect to which gradients are computed. We further propose HybridGrad, which combines the strengths of SemGrad and parameter gradients. Experiments demonstrate that both of our methods provide efficient and effective uncertainty estimates, achieving superior performance than state-of-the-art methods, particularly in settings with multiple valid responses.

Uncertainty-Aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization for Multimodal Large Language Models

High 2605.04874
Huatian Zhang, Zhendong Mao, Lei Zhang, Yongdong Zhang
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出不确定性感知的探索性直接偏好优化（UE-DPO），通过认知不确定性引导 MLLM 主动探索并纠正视觉缺陷，缓解幻觉。
🎯研究动机

DPO 在缓解 MLLM 幻觉中有效，但现有方法依赖模型自评估的视觉敏感性，存在自我引用偏差，强化已学好的视觉线索而忽略难以感知的关键细节，限制了深度对齐。

❓解决问题

如何将序列级偏好转化为细粒度的视觉保真度监督，并避免自我引用偏差，使模型主动发现并纠正视觉认知缺陷。

🔎现象分析

模型自评估的视觉敏感性存在自我引用偏差：强化已学好的视觉线索，忽略难以感知但关键的细节。

🛠️主要方法

提出 UE-DPO，首先量化模型无法将 token 预测与图像对齐的不确定性，然后基于不确定性感知的探索强度，在偏好样本中增加对视觉缺陷 token 的学习压力，在非偏好样本中减轻对有益知识的过度惩罚。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出不确定性感知的探索性直接偏好优化方法，通过认知不确定性引导模型主动探索并纠正视觉缺陷。
  • 提供了理论证明，并通过大量实验验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 不确定性量化可能增加计算开销。
  • 探索强度超参数需要调优。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) has proven to be an effective solution for mitigating hallucination in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) by learning from preference pairs. One of its key challenges lies in how to transfer the sequence-level preference into fine-grained supervision on visual fidelity. To safeguard vision-related tokens that are prone to hallucination, existing methods typically allocate training emphasis according to the model's self-assessed visual sensitivity signals. However, such sensitivity, estimated by a model still under training, introduces self-referential bias: reinforcing already well-learned visual cues while neglecting hard-to-perceive but critical details, thereby limiting deeper alignment. In this work, we propose an Uncertainty-aware Exploratory Direct Preference Optimization (UE-DPO) method for MLLMs, which enables the model to uncover its cognitive deficiencies and actively explore for self-correction, guided by token-level epistemic uncertainty. Specifically, we first quantify the uncertainty from the model's failure to ground token predictions in the given image. Then, based on an uncertainty-aware exploration intensity, we encourage more learning pressure on visually deficient tokens in preferred samples, and alleviate the over-penalization of beneficial knowledge in dispreferred samples. Further, we provide a theoretical justification for our method, and extensive experiments demonstrate its effectiveness and robustness.

The First Token Knows: Single-Decode Confidence for Hallucination Detection

High 2605.05166
Mina Gabriel
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：首个 token 的置信度即可媲美多采样语义一致性，用于幻觉检测。
🎯研究动机

现有幻觉检测方法如自一致性需要多次解码且对词汇变化敏感，语义自一致性虽改进但增加了采样和外部推理开销，亟需低成本基线。

❓解决问题

如何在不增加解码开销的前提下，高效检测大模型在事实问答中的幻觉。

🔎现象分析

多采样一致性捕获的不确定性信息大部分已存在于模型首个 token 的分布中。

🛠️主要方法

提出 phi_first，基于单次贪心解码首个内容 token 的 top-K logits 归一化熵计算置信度。

📊实验结果

在三个 7-8B 指令微调模型和两个基准上，phi_first 平均 AUROC 为 0.820，优于语义一致性 0.793 和表面形式自一致性 0.791。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出单次解码的首 token 置信度 phi_first，无需采样或外部模型。
  • 在多个模型和基准上验证 phi_first 达到或超过语义自一致性，且与后者高度相关。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅适用于闭卷短答案事实问答，未验证长文本或开放域场景。
  • 依赖首个 token 的 logits，可能不适用于生成式任务中后续 token 的幻觉。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Self-consistency detects hallucinations by generating multiple sampled answers to a question and measuring agreement, but this requires repeated decoding and can be sensitive to lexical variation. Semantic self-consistency improves this by clustering sampled answers by meaning using natural language inference, but it adds both sampling cost and external inference overhead. We show that first-token confidence, phi_first, computed from the normalized entropy of the top-K logits at the first content-bearing answer token of a single greedy decode, matches or modestly exceeds semantic self-consistency on closed-book short-answer factual question answering. Across three 7-8B instruction-tuned models and two benchmarks, phi_first achieves a mean AUROC of 0.820, compared with 0.793 for semantic agreement and 0.791 for standard surface-form self-consistency. A subsumption test shows that phi_first is moderately to strongly correlated with semantic agreement, and combining the two signals yields only a small AUROC improvement over phi_first alone. These results suggest that much of the uncertainty information captured by multi-sample agreement is already available in the model's initial token distribution. We argue that phi_first should be reported as a default low-cost baseline before invoking sampling-based uncertainty estimation.

MedFabric and EtHER: A Data-Centric Framework for Word-Level Fabrication Generation and Detection in Medical LLMs

High 2605.04180
Tung Sum Thomas Kwok, Qian Qian, Xiaofeng Lin, Dongxu Zhang, Jun Han, Zhichao Yang, Davin Hill, Tamer Soliman et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出数据驱动的医学 LLM 幻觉检测框架，通过合成高保真词级虚构数据并设计模块化检测器，在词级虚构基准上超越 SOTA 超 15%。
🎯研究动机

医学领域 LLM 的虚构（fabrication）现象风险极高，但现有医疗幻觉数据集因虚构覆盖有限、文本风格差异和分布漂移等问题，无法有效捕捉真实虚构。

❓解决问题

如何生成高保真、词级、保持句法和风格一致性的医学虚构数据，并设计能精确检测词级虚构的检测器。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

数据驱动流水线：1) 生成 MedFabric 数据集，通过保持句法和风格一致性引入细微事实偏差；2) 构建 ETHER 检测器，包含 Text2Table 分解、词掩码填充和混合句对评估三个模块。

📊实验结果

在词级虚构基准上，MedFabric+ETHER 相比 SOTA 检测器提升超 15%，且在结构相似性上保持一致性。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 MedFabric 数据集，用于生成高保真词级医学虚构。
  • 提出 ETHER 检测器，在词级虚构基准上超越 SOTA 超 15%。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对医学领域，泛化性未验证。
  • 依赖合成数据，真实场景虚构分布可能不同。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Large Language Models exhibit strong reasoning and semantic understanding capabilities but often hallucinate in domains that require expert knowledge, among which fabrications, the generation of factually incorrect yet fluent statements, pose the greatest risk in medical contexts. Existing medical hallucination datasets inadequately capture fabrication phenomena due to limited fabrication coverage, stylistic disparities between human and LLM-authored texts, and distributional drift during hallucinated sample synthesis. To address this, we propose a data-centric pipeline to generate realistic and word-level fabrications that preserve syntactic and stylistic fidelity while introducing subtle factual deviations, resulting in MedFabric. Building upon this dataset, we introduce ETHER, a modular word-level fabrication detector integrating Text2Table Decomposition, Word Masking and Filling and Hybrid Sentence Pair Evaluation to enhance factual alignment. Empirical results demonstrate that MedFabric outperforms state-of-the-art detectors by over 15% on word-level fabrication benchmarks while maintaining consistent performance across structural similarities, offering a comprehensive framework for reliable and domain-specific factuality detection.

红队与评估 5 篇

DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap): A Controllable and Interactive Red-Teaming Platform for AI Agents

High 2605.04808
Zhaorun Chen, Xun Liu, Haibo Tong, Chengquan Guo, Yuzhou Nie, Jiawei Zhang, Mintong Kang, Chejian Xu et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：提出首个可控交互式 AI Agent 红队平台 DTap，含 14 个领域 50+ 仿真环境，并配套自动化红队 Agent DTap-Red 和基准数据集 DTap-Bench，系统评估主流 Agent 的安全漏洞。
🎯研究动机

AI Agent 在动态、不可信环境中执行高风险操作，面临严重安全威胁，但缺乏可控、可复现的大规模风险评估平台。

❓解决问题

现有环境难以支持对 AI Agent 进行真实、可控且可复现的大规模红队测试。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

构建 DTap 平台，包含 14 个真实世界领域和 50+ 仿真环境；提出 DTap-Red 自动化红队 Agent，可系统探索多种注入向量并自主发现攻击策略；基于 DTap-Red 构建 DTap-Bench 数据集，每个实例配有可验证的评判器。

📊实验结果

在 DTap 平台上对基于多种骨干模型的流行 AI Agent 进行大规模评估，覆盖安全策略、风险类别和攻击策略，揭示了系统性漏洞模式。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出首个可控交互式红队平台 DTap，覆盖 14 个领域和 50+ 仿真环境。
  • 提出首个自动化红队 Agent DTap-Red，能自主探索多种注入向量并发现攻击策略。
  • 构建大规模红队数据集 DTap-Bench，含高质量实例和可验证评判器。
  • 通过大规模评估揭示主流 Agent 的系统性漏洞模式，为开发安全 Agent 提供见解。
⚠️方法局限
  • 平台覆盖的领域和仿真环境可能仍有遗漏。
  • 自动化红队 Agent 的攻击策略可能无法覆盖所有攻击向量。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

AI agents are increasingly deployed across diverse domains to automate complex workflows through long-horizon and high-stakes action executions. Due to their high capability and flexibility, such agents raise significant security and safety concerns. A growing number of real-world incidents have shown that adversaries can easily manipulate agents into performing harmful actions, such as leaking API keys, deleting user data, or initiating unauthorized transactions. Evaluating agent security is inherently challenging, as agents operate in dynamic, untrusted environments involving external tools, heterogeneous data sources, and frequent user interactions. However, realistic, controllable, and reproducible environments for large-scale risk assessment remain largely underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the DecodingTrust-Agent Platform (DTap), the first controllable and interactive red-teaming platform for AI agents, spanning 14 real-world domains and over 50 simulation environments that replicate widely used systems such as Google Workspace, Paypal, and Slack. To scale the risk assessment of agents in DTap, we further propose DTap-Red, the first autonomous red-teaming agent that systematically explores diverse injection vectors (e.g., prompt, tool, skill, environment, combinations) and autonomously discovers effective attack strategies tailored to varying malicious goals. Using DTap-Red, we curate DTap-Bench, a large-scale red-teaming dataset comprising high-quality instances across domains, each paired with a verifiable judge to automatically validate attack outcomes. Through DTap, we conduct large-scale evaluations of popular AI agents built on various backbone models, spanning security policies, risk categories, and attack strategies, revealing systematic vulnerability patterns and providing valuable insights for developing secure next-generation agents.

Frontier Lag: A Bibliometric Audit of Capability Misrepresentation in Academic AI Evaluation

High 2605.04135
David Gringras, Misha Salahshoor
arXiv PDF cs.CY
TL;DR：学术 AI 评估中测试模型远落后于前沿，且结论常被抽象为“AI”能力，导致能力误报。
🎯研究动机

应用领域的 LLM 能力评估旨在回答“AI 系统当前能做什么”，但实际文献评估的是过时、廉价、未充分调用的模型，导致结论与真实前沿能力存在系统性偏差，影响政策、媒体和引用传播。

❓解决问题

量化并解释学术 AI 评估中测试模型与同时期前沿模型之间的能力差距（publication elicitation gap），并评估结论抽象化程度。

🔎现象分析

摘要通过审计 112,303 篇论文发现：中位论文评估的模型落后前沿 10.85 ECI（约 1.4 倍 Claude Sonnet 3.7 到 Claude Opus 4.5 的距离），且差距以每年 5.53 ECI 扩大；仅 3.2% 摘要披露推理模式状态，52.5% 结论抽象为“AI”而非具体模型。

🛠️主要方法

预注册审计：从 112,303 篇 LLM 关键词匹配候选记录中筛选出 18,574 篇可接受、4,766 篇可获取全文，比较测试模型与 Epoch AI 能力指数（ECI）上的同时期前沿，并辅以 Arena Elo 和 Artificial Analysis 复现；提出 VERSIO-AI 检查清单（13 项，核心 3 项为 desk-reject）以规范配置表面披露。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了审计流程：112,303 篇候选记录，18,574 篇可接受，4,766 篇可获取全文，使用 ECI、Arena Elo 和 Artificial Analysis 作为前沿指标。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次大规模量化学术 LLM 评估中的“发表诱发差距”，发现中位论文落后前沿 10.85 ECI 且差距逐年扩大。
  • 揭示结论抽象化问题：52.5% 摘要将结果归因于“AI”而非具体模型，且比例逐年上升。
  • 提出 VERSIO-AI 检查清单，要求披露模型快照、推理模式 / 努力、工具访问、脚手架、提示等配置信息。
⚠️方法局限
  • 审计仅覆盖 2022-01 至 2026-04 的论文，可能不反映更早或更晚的趋势。
  • ECI 等前沿指标本身可能存在偏差或更新延迟。
  • VERSIO-AI 清单的有效性需进一步实证验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Readers of applied-domain LLM capability evaluations want to know what AI systems can currently do. That literature answers a related, but consequentially different, question: what older, cheaper, less-elicited models could do months or years earlier (a 2026 paper evaluating GPT-4o-mini zero-shot, say, against a frontier of reasoning-capable, tool-using systems like GPT-5.5 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7), often reported with sparse configuration details and abstracted upward into claims about "AI" that propagate through citations, media, and policy. We measure the 'publication elicitation gap' (the gap between these answers) in a pre-registered audit of 112,303 LLM-keyword-matched candidate records (2022-01 to 2026-04; 18,574 admissible, 4,766 full-paper texts retrievable), comparing tested models to the contemporaneous frontier on the Epoch AI Capabilities Index (ECI), reproduced under Arena Elo and Artificial Analysis. The median paper evaluates a model +10.85 ECI (~1.4x the distance between Claude Sonnet 3.7 and Claude Opus 4.5) behind the contemporaneous frontier at evaluation time (H1); an exploratory rational-lag baseline (H8) decomposes this into ~25% peer-review latency, ~75% excess lag. The gap is widening at +5.53 ECI/year (H2; 95% CI [+5.03, +5.83]). Meanwhile, only 3.2% of abstracts (21.2% of full-texts) disclose reasoning-mode status on reasoning-capable models (H4) and 52.5% (95% CI [48.2, 56.9]) state conclusions at the level of "AI" rather than the evaluated model(s), rising at OR = 1.23/year. Proposed remedies include API-access subsidies and editorial enforcement of reporting frameworks mandating configuration-surface disclosure (model snapshot, reasoning mode/effort, tool access, scaffolding, prompting, etc.); VERSIO-AI is a 13-item checklist (Core 3 desk-reject) extending existing frameworks at the elicitation surface, with per-DOI analysis at this http URL .

Beyond Seeing Is Believing: On Crowdsourced Detection of Audiovisual Deepfakes

Medium 2605.04797
Michael Soprano, Andrea Cioci, Stefano Mizzaro
arXiv PDF cs.IR
TL;DR：众包检测音视频深度伪造时，工人能准确识别真实视频，但容易漏检篡改，且篡改类型识别噪声大。
🎯研究动机

深度伪造越来越逼真且易于制作，引发了对人类判断在虚假信息场景中可靠性的担忧。

❓解决问题

研究众包工人检测音视频深度伪造的准确性、篡改类型识别和篡改时间戳报告的一致性。

🔎现象分析

工人很少将真实视频误判为篡改，但漏检大量篡改；工人间一致性有限；聚合多份判断可稳定真实性信号，但无法恢复多数工人一致漏检的篡改；篡改类型识别比真实性检测噪声更大，音视频联合篡改尤其难以识别。

🛠️主要方法

在 Prolific 上开展两项匹配的众包研究，使用 AV-Deepfake1M 和 Trusted Media Challenge 数据集，每个数据集采样 48 个视频（共 96 个），收集 960 份判断（每个视频 10 份）。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了实验设置：两个数据集，96 个视频，960 份判断。

⭐主要贡献
  • 量化了众包工人在音视频深度伪造检测中的表现，包括真实性判断、篡改类型识别和时间戳报告。
  • 揭示了众包检测的局限性：漏检率高、类型识别噪声大，尤其是音视频联合篡改。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅使用两个数据集，样本量有限（96 个视频）。
  • 未探讨不同工人特征或培训对检测效果的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deepfakes are increasingly realistic and easy to produce, raising concerns about the reliability of human judgments in misinformation settings. We study audiovisual deepfake detection by measuring how consistently crowd workers distinguish authentic from manipulated videos and, when they flag a video as manipulated, how accurately they identify the manipulation type (audio-only, video-only, or audio-video) and how consistently they report manipulation timestamps. We run two matched crowdsourcing studies on Prolific using AV-Deepfake1M and the Trusted Media Challenge (TMC) dataset. We sample 48 videos per dataset (96 total) and collect 960 judgments (10 per video). Results show that crowd workers rarely misclassify authentic videos as manipulated, but they miss many manipulations, and agreement remains limited across videos. Aggregating multiple judgments per video stabilizes the authenticity signal, but it cannot recover manipulations that most workers consistently miss. Manipulation type identification is substantially noisier than authenticity detection even when workers detect a manipulation, with joint audio-video cases being particularly hard to recognize. Overall, these findings suggest that crowdsourcing can provide a scalable screening signal for audiovisual authenticity, while reliable modality attribution remains an open challenge.

Automatically Finding and Validating Unexpected Side-Effects of Interventions on Language Models

Medium 2605.05090
Quintin Pope, Ajay Hayagreeve Balaji, Jacques Thibodeau, Xiaoli Fern
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：提出自动化对比评估流水线，审计语言模型干预的意外副作用。
🎯研究动机

语言模型干预（如知识编辑、去学习）可能引入意外行为变化，现有审计方法缺乏自动化、统计验证和可解释性。

❓解决问题

如何自动发现并统计验证干预前后模型行为的差异，生成可读的自然语言假设。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

对比评估流水线：在对齐提示上下文中比较自由文本生成，通过统计检验生成自然语言假设，并总结重复主题。

📊实验结果

在合成注入变化和三种真实干预（推理蒸馏、知识编辑、去学习）上评估，显示方法能可靠恢复已知变化并发现意外行为。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出自动化、对比式审计流水线，可发现干预的预期和意外行为变化。
  • 在合成和真实干预场景中验证方法有效性，能区分显著与细微差异，且不产生幻觉。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖提示库的质量和覆盖范围。
  • 可能无法捕捉所有类型的副作用。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We present an automated, contrastive evaluation pipeline for auditing the behavioral impact of interventions on large language models. Given a base model $M_1$ and an intervention model $M_2$, our method compares their free-form, multi-token generations across aligned prompt contexts and produces human-readable, statistically validated natural-language hypotheses describing how the models differ, along with recurring themes that summarize patterns across validated hypotheses. We evaluate the approach in synthetic setting by injecting known behavioral changes and showing that the pipeline reliably recovers them. We then apply it to three real-world interventions, reasoning distillation, knowledge editing and unlearning, demonstrating that the method surfaces both intended and unexpected behavioral shifts, distinguishes large from subtle interventions, and does not hallucinate differences when effects are absent or misaligned with the prompt bank. Overall, the pipeline provides a statistically grounded and interpretable tool for post-hoc auditing of intervention-induced changes in model behavior.

Toward Human-AI Complementarity Across Diverse Tasks

Medium 2605.04070
Yuzheng Xu, Annya Dahmani, Matthew D. Blanchard, Niclas Dern, Edy Nastase, Francesca Bianco, Maja Pavlovic, Sukanya Krishna et al.
arXiv PDF cs.HC
TL;DR：人类 -AI 互补性在多样化任务中增益有限，主要瓶颈在于决策路由和辅助方法设计。
🎯研究动机

人类 -AI 互补性有望提升 AI 系统的鲁棒性，但能否在现实任务中实现尚不明确，现有研究缺乏系统评估。

❓解决问题

评估人类 -AI 互补性在多样化任务中的实际效果，并分析其瓶颈。

🔎现象分析

互补区域小（仅 8.9% 的 AI 错误项人类正确），且基于置信度的路由无法有效识别该区域；top-2 辅助提升人类准确率主要源于采纳正确建议，而非纠正 AI 错误。

🛠️主要方法

采用混合化（hybridization）和两种 AI 辅助方法（top-2 辅助和子任务委派），在多领域数据集上评估。

📊实验结果

在包含 1886 个样本的多领域数据集上评估，覆盖知识、事实性、长上下文推理和欺骗检测。

⭐主要贡献
  • 系统评估了人类 -AI 互补性在多样化任务中的表现，发现增益有限。
  • 识别出主要瓶颈是决策路由和辅助方法设计，而非人类任务准确率本身。
  • 提供定量和定性分析，指出各方法成功与失败的具体原因。
⚠️方法局限
  • 互补区域小，可能限制方法的通用性。
  • 置信度路由效果不佳，需要更精细的识别机制。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Human-AI complementarity, the idea that combining human and AI judgments can outperform either alone, offers a promising pathway toward robust oversight of advanced AI systems. However, whether human-AI complementarity can be achieved on realistic tasks remains an open question. We investigate this through two approaches: hybridization and two AI assistance methods (top-2 assistance and subtask delegation), evaluated on a multi-domain dataset of 1,886 samples spanning knowledge, factuality, long-context reasoning, and deception detection. We find only modest complementarity gains. Baseline hybridization yields just +0.4 percentage points (pp) over AI alone (69.3\% vs 68.9\%), limited both by a small complementarity region (only 8.9\% of items where AI errs but humans do not) and the inability of confidence-based routing to identify it, since the model's confidence is similarly distributed across correct and incorrect predictions. Applied when AI has low confidence, top-2 assistance increases human accuracy from 28.4\% to 38.3\%, surpassing AI alone (37.7\%) -- but primarily because humans adopt correct AI suggestions, not because they successfully override AI errors. These findings suggest that the primary bottleneck is not human task accuracy per se, but the ability to route decisions to humans when it matters and to design assistance methods that enable humans to catch AI mistakes. Our quantitative and qualitative analyses pinpoint where and why each method succeeds or fails, offering concrete targets for future work. We will release our dataset and code upon request to support progress toward more effective human-AI collaboration for AI oversight.

隐私/水印/版权 5 篇

On the (In-)Security of the Shuffling Defense in the Transformer Secure Inference

High 2605.04901
Zhengyi Li, Yakai Wang, Kang Yang, Yu Yu, Jiaping Gui, Yu Feng, Ning Liu, Minyi Guo et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：揭示 Transformer 安全推理中 shuffling 防御的脆弱性，提出对齐攻击可低成本提取模型权重。
🎯研究动机

Transformer 安全推理中，为提升效率而暴露中间激活值给客户端，但现有 shuffling 防御被认为可保护模型权重；然而其安全性未经充分验证，存在被攻破的风险。

❓解决问题

证明 shuffling 防御在 Transformer 安全推理中不足以保护模型权重，并设计攻击方法提取权重。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出一种攻击方法，将不同次查询中随机排列的激活值对齐到同一排列，进而利用对齐后的激活值提取模型权重。

📊实验结果

在 Pythia-70m 和 GPT-2 上实验，对齐激活值的均方误差为 10^{-9}至 10^{-6}，权重恢复的 L1 范数差异为 10^{-4}至 10^{-2}。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次证明 shuffling 防御在 Transformer 安全推理中不安全，可被对齐攻击突破。
  • 提出一种低成本攻击，在 Pythia-70m 和 GPT-2 上以约 1 美元查询成本恢复模型权重，L1 范数差异仅 10^{-4}至 10^{-2}。
⚠️方法局限
  • 攻击可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性未验证。
  • 未讨论防御方可能的反制措施。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

For Transformer models, cryptographically secure inference ensures that the client learns only the final output, while the server learns nothing about the client's input. However, securely computing nonlinear layers remains a major efficiency bottleneck due to the substantial communication rounds and data transmission required. To address this issue, prior works reveal intermediate activations to the client, allowing nonlinear operations to be computed in plaintext. Although this approach significantly improves efficiency, exposing activations enables adversaries to extract model weights. To mitigate this risk, existing works employ a shuffling defense that reveals only randomly permuted activations to the client. In this work, we show that the shuffling defense is not as robust as previously claimed. We propose an attack that aligns differently shuffled activations to a common permutation and subsequently exploits them to extract model weights. Experiments on Pythia-70m and GPT-2 demonstrate that the proposed attack can align shuffled activations with mean squared errors ranging from $10^{-9}$ to $10^{-6}$. With a query cost of approximately \$1, the adversary can recover model weights with L1-norm differences ranging from $10^{-4}$ to $10^{-2}$ compared to the oracle weights.

From Beats to Breaches:How Offensive AI Infers Sensitive User Information from Playlists

Medium 2605.04724
Stefano Cecconello, Mauro Conti, Luca Pajola, Luca Pasa, Pier Paolo Tricomi
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：音乐播放列表可被用于推断用户敏感信息，本文提出攻击工具 musicPIIrate 和防御框架 JamShield。
🎯研究动机

AI 的广泛集成催生了 Offensive AI，即利用 AI 进行恶意活动。用户属性推断攻击是一种关键表现，能从看似无害的公开数据中推断出敏感的个人身份信息（PII）。音乐流媒体生态中用户公开的播放列表可能被利用，但现有研究缺乏对此威胁的量化评估和防御手段。

❓解决问题

如何从用户公开的音乐播放列表中准确推断敏感 PII，并设计有效的防御机制来缓解这一隐私泄露风险。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

开发了 musicPIIrate 工具，利用深度学习架构（如 Deep Sets 和图神经网络）处理无序、变长集合数据，提取播放列表中的结构信息进行 PII 推断。同时提出 JamShield 防御框架，通过向账户中注入虚假播放列表来稀释 PII 信号。

📊实验结果

在 15 个属性推断任务上评估，musicPIIrate 在 9 个任务中达到最优，JamShield 降低 F1 分数平均 10%。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出了 musicPIIrate，一种基于集合和图神经网络的播放列表 PII 推断工具，在 15 个属性推断任务中 9 个超越基线。
  • 提出了 JamShield，一种轻量级防御框架，通过注入虚假播放列表降低推断 F1 分数平均 10%。
  • 为基于播放列表的 PII 推断提供了首个 Offensive-AI 基准。
⚠️方法局限
  • 防御效果可能有限，攻击者可能通过更复杂的方法绕过。
  • 实验可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The pervasive integration of AI has enabled Offensive AI: the exploitation of AI for malicious ends across the cyber-kill chain. A critical manifestation is the user attribute inference attack, where AI infers sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from innocuous public data. We explore how music streaming ecosystems, where users routinely release public playlists, can be exploited for Offensive AI. To quantify this threat, we developed musicPIIrate. This novel tool leverages deep learning architectures that utilize both standalone data representations and the structural information embedded in a user's playlist collection. Our design explores set-based approaches (e.g., Deep Sets) and methodologies modeling relationships between playlists (e.g., Graph Neural Networks), which we also combine to leverage both perspectives. Our approach addresses feature extraction from unordered, variable-length set data, enabling accurate PII prediction. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that musicPIIrate achieves state-of-the-art inference accuracy. The tool successfully infers a wide array of attributes, including: Demographics (Age, Country, Gender), Habits (Alcohol, Smoke, Sport), and Personality Traits (OCEAN scores). musicPIIrate outperforms existing methods, beating baselines in 9 out of 15 attribute inference tasks. To counter this vulnerability, we propose JamShield, a lightweight defensive framework. JamShield strategically injects dummy playlists into an account to dilute the PII-carrying signal. Our analysis indicates that JamShield represents a promising defense, lowering inference F1-scores by an average of 10%. This work provides an initial Offensive-AI benchmark for playlist-based PII inference using architectures that leverage set- and graph-structured data and introduces a defense showing encouraging mitigation effects.

Knowledge-Free Correlated Agreement for Incentivizing Federated Learning

Medium 2605.04747
Leon Witt, Togrul Abbasli, Kentaroh Toyoda, Wojciech Samek, Lucy Klinger
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：提出无知识相关协议（KFCA）用于联邦学习激励，无需真值或公共测试集，抵抗标签翻转攻击。
🎯研究动机

联邦学习中激励客户端贡献需要评估数据质量，但现有方法依赖真值或公共测试集，存在隐私和攻击风险。

❓解决问题

如何在联邦学习中设计一种无需任何先验知识（真值、公共测试集、分布信息）的激励机制，同时抵抗标签翻转等恶意攻击。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出知识无关相关协议（KFCA），基于分类报告和诚实多数假设，通过客户端报告之间的相关性计算奖励，无需真值。

📊实验结果

在联邦 LLM 适配器调优和真实 PCB 检测任务上评估，显示实时奖励计算高效，适用于去中心化和区块链激励设计。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出 KFCA，一种无需真值、公共测试集或分布知识的联邦学习激励机制。
  • 证明 KFCA 在诚实多数下严格真实，并抵抗标签翻转攻击。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖诚实多数假设，在多数恶意客户端场景下可能失效。
  • 仅适用于分类报告，扩展至连续值或复杂任务需进一步研究。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce Knowledge-Free Correlated Agreement (KFCA) to reward client contributions in federated learning (FL) without relying on ground truth, a public test set, or distribution knowledge. Under categorical reports and an honest majority, KFCA is strictly truthful, addressing the label-flipping vulnerability of Correlated Agreement (CA). We evaluate KFCA on federated LLM adapter tuning and a real-world PCB inspection task, showing efficient real-time reward computation suitable for decentralized and blockchain-based incentive designs.

Position: Embodied AI Requires a Privacy-Utility Trade-off

Medium 2605.05017
Xiaoliang Fan, Jiarui Chen, Zhuodong Liu, Ziqi Yang, Peixuan Xu, Ruimin Shen, Junhui Liu, Jianzhong Qi et al.
arXiv PDF cs.AI
TL;DR：本文主张隐私应作为具身 AI 全生命周期的架构约束，并提出 SPINE 框架实现跨阶段隐私控制。
🎯研究动机

具身 AI 系统正快速进入家庭等敏感环境，但现有方案将指令、感知、规划、交互等阶段独立优化，忽略了高频部署中隐私泄露的不可逆风险，导致系统性隐私危机。

❓解决问题

解决具身 AI 系统中隐私保护被碎片化处理、缺乏跨阶段统一约束的问题。

🔎现象分析

摘要指出，现有 EAI 方案在各阶段独立优化，未考虑耦合的隐私影响，导致在敏感环境中部署时隐私泄露不可逆。

🛠️主要方法

提出 SPINE 框架，将隐私视为动态控制信号，通过多准则隐私分类矩阵协调跨阶段上下文敏感性，实现全生命周期隐私集成。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及进行了初步仿真和真实世界案例研究来概念验证。

⭐主要贡献
  • 论证隐私应是具身 AI 全生命周期的架构约束而非局部特征
  • 提出 SPINE 统一隐私感知框架，包含多准则隐私分类矩阵和跨阶段耦合控制机制
⚠️方法局限
  • 框架尚处于概念验证阶段，缺乏大规模定量实验
  • 隐私 - 效用权衡的具体量化方法未详细说明
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Embodied AI (EAI) systems are rapidly transitioning from simulations into real-world domestic and other sensitive environments. However, recent EAI solutions have largely demonstrated advancements within isolated stages such as instruction, perception, planning and interaction, without considering their coupled privacy implications in high-frequency deployments where privacy leakage is often irreversible. This position paper argues that optimizing these components independently creates a systemic privacy crisis when deployed in sensitive settings, thereby advancing the position that privacy in EAI is a life cycle-level architectural constraint rather than a stage-local feature. To address these challenges, we propose Secure Privacy Integration in Next-generation Embodied AI (SPINE), a unified privacy-aware framework that treats privacy as a dynamic control signal governing cross-stage coupling throughout the entire EAI life cycle. SPINE decomposes the EAI pipeline into various stages and establishes a multi-criterion privacy classification matrix to orchestrate contextual sensitivity across stage boundaries. We conduct preliminary simulation and real-world case studies to conceptually validate how privacy constraints propagate downstream to reshape system behavior, illustrating the insufficiency of fragmented privacy patches and motivating future research directions into secure yet functional embodied AI systems. We detail the SPINE framework and case studies at this https URL .

SWAN: Semantic Watermarking with Abstract Meaning Representation

Medium 2605.04305
Ziping Ye, Gourab Dey, Christos Christodoulopoulos, Charith Peris, Anil Ramakrishna, Weitong Ruan, Aram Galstyan, Kai-Wei Chang et al.
arXiv PDF cs.CL
TL;DR：SWAN 利用抽象语义表示在句子语义结构中嵌入水印，显著提升对释义攻击的鲁棒性。
🎯研究动机

现有文本水印方法通常通过调整 token 选择偏好来编码签名，但这类方法在文本被释义后容易失效，缺乏对语义层面篡改的鲁棒性。

❓解决问题

如何设计一种文本水印方法，使其在保留语义的前提下对释义攻击具有强鲁棒性。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

SWAN 框架：使用抽象语义表示（AMR）将水印签名嵌入句子的语义结构中；水印注入通过提示 LLM 生成符合选定 AMR 模板的句子实现，检测则使用现成的 AMR 解析器结合单比例 z 检验。

📊实验结果

在 RealNews 基准上评估，SWAN 在未修改文本上检测性能与 SOTA 相当，在释义攻击下 AUC 提升高达 13.9 个百分点。

⭐主要贡献
  • 提出基于 AMR 语义结构的水印嵌入方法，无需训练，仅需提示 LLM。
  • 在 RealNews 基准上，SWAN 在未修改文本上达到 SOTA 检测性能，并在释义攻击下 AUC 提升高达 13.9 个百分点。
⚠️方法局限
  • 依赖 AMR 解析器的准确性，可能影响检测性能。
  • 仅针对英文文本，对其他语言的适用性未验证。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

We introduce SWAN (Semantic Watermarking with Abstract Meaning Representation), a novel framework that embeds watermark signatures into the semantic structure of a sentence using Abstract Meaning Representation (AMR). In contrast to existing watermarking methods, which typically encode signatures by adjusting token selection preferences during text generation, SWAN embeds the signature directly in the sentence's semantic representation. As the signature is encoded at the semantic structure level, any paraphrase that preserves meaning automatically preserves the signature. SWAN is training-free: watermark injection is achieved by prompting an LLM to generate sentences guided by a selected AMR template while maintaining contextual coherence, and detection uses an off-the-shelf AMR parser followed by a simple one-proportion z-test. Empirical evaluation on the RealNews benchmark shows SWAN matches state-of-the-art detection performance on unaltered watermarked text, while significantly improving robustness against paraphrasing, increasing detection AUC by up to 13.9 percentage points compared to prior methods. These results demonstrate that SWAN's approach of anchoring watermarks in AMR semantic structures provides a simple, effective, and prompt-based method for robust text provenance verification under paraphrasing, opening new avenues for semantic-level watermarking research.

鲁棒性与对抗 2 篇

Dissociating spatial frequency reliance from adversarial robustness advantages in neurally guided deep convolutional neural networks

Medium 2605.04443
Zhenan Shao, Tianyu Ren, Chengxiao Wang, Leyla Isik, Diane M. Beck
arXiv PDF q-bio.NC
TL;DR：神经对齐提升 DCNN 对抗鲁棒性的机制并非源于对低频或人眼频段的依赖，而是更类人表征的副产品。
🎯研究动机

深度卷积网络在视觉任务上表现优异，但对对抗攻击脆弱；神经对齐可提升鲁棒性，但其机制不明，需厘清空间频率偏好的作用。

❓解决问题

探究神经对齐 DCNN 中对抗鲁棒性的提升是否主要源于对低频空间频率或人眼中频通道的依赖。

🔎现象分析

神经对齐模型同时增加对低频和人眼频段的依赖；但直接偏置模型至人眼频段不提升鲁棒性甚至损害，低频偏置仅带来适度增益；空间频率偏置模型与人类神经表征相似度低。

🛠️主要方法

通过分析神经对齐 DCNN 的空间频率依赖，并直接操纵模型偏置至低频或人眼频段，对比鲁棒性变化。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现神经对齐 DCNN 的对抗鲁棒性并非由空间频率偏置直接驱动，而是类人表征学习的副产品。
  • 揭示人眼频段偏置不能提升鲁棒性，低频偏置效果有限，为未来研究指明方向。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅基于特定 DCNN 架构和数据集，结论泛化性需验证。
  • 未探索其他表征属性对鲁棒性的影响。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have rivaled humans on many visual tasks, yet they remain vulnerable to near-imperceptible perturbations generated by adversarial attacks. Recent work shows that aligning DCNN representations with human visual cortex activity improves adversarial robustness, but the mechanisms driving this advantage are unclear. One hypothesis suggests that neural alignment confers robustness by biasing models away from brittle high-frequency details and towards the low spatial frequencies (LSF). However, recent work shows that human object recognition critically depends on a narrow, mid-frequency "human channel". Interestingly, this band was partially preserved in prior LSF-focused studies. Here, we investigate whether a spectral bias towards the LSF or the human channel is the primary driver of the adversarial robustness observed in neurally aligned DCNNs. We first show that DCNNs aligned to higher-order regions of the human ventral visual stream systematically increase reliance on both LSF and the human channel. However, directly steering DCNNs towards these bands revealed a clear dissociation. Biasing models towards the human channel, either alone or together with LSF, does not improve robustness and even impairs it. LSF bias produced some robustness gains, but such improvements are modest despite inducing much larger shifts in spatial-frequency reliance than neurally aligned models. Spatial-frequency-biased models overall show little, if any, increase in similarity to human neural representational geometry. Together, our results suggest that altered spatial-frequency reliance is likely an emergent property of learning more human-like representations rather than the primary mechanism by which neural alignment confers adversarial robustness, and motivate the need for future research examining representational properties beyond spatial-frequency profiles.

Physical Adversarial Clothing Evades Visible-Thermal Detectors via Non-Overlapping RGB-T Pattern

Medium 2605.04675
Xiaopei Zhu, Guanning Zeng, Zhanhao Hu, Jun Zhu, Xiaolin Hu
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出非重叠 RGB-T 图案的对抗服装，通过空间离散 - 连续优化方法实现对可见 - 热红外双模检测器的物理对抗攻击。
🎯研究动机

可见 - 热红外双模检测器在自动驾驶等应用中至关重要，但其物理世界安全性被忽视，现有对抗攻击方法未考虑双模融合特性。

❓解决问题

如何设计物理对抗服装，在可见光和热红外两个模态上同时欺骗 RGB-T 检测器，并实现全视角攻击。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体现象分析。

🛠️主要方法

提出非重叠 RGB-T 图案（NORP）的对抗服装，使用不重叠的可见光和热红外材料；采用空间离散 - 连续优化方法（SDCO）优化图案；引入融合阶段集成方法增强跨架构迁移性。

📊实验结果

在数字和物理世界中对不同融合架构的 RGB-T 检测器进行系统评估，显示高攻击成功率。

⭐主要贡献
  • 首次提出针对 RGB-T 双模检测器的物理对抗攻击方法，使用非重叠 RGB-T 图案。
  • 提出空间离散 - 连续优化方法（SDCO）优化对抗图案，并引入融合阶段集成方法提升迁移性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 可能仅针对特定人体模型和服装材质有效。
  • 未讨论对遮挡或动态场景的鲁棒性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Visible-thermal (RGB-T) object detection is a crucial technology for applications such as autonomous driving, where multimodal fusion enhances performance in challenging conditions like low light. However, the security of RGB-T detectors, particularly in the physical world, has been largely overlooked. This paper proposes a novel approach to RGB-T physical attacks using adversarial clothing with a non-overlapping RGB-T pattern (NORP). To simulate full-view (0$^{\circ}$--360$^{\circ}$) RGB-T attacks, we construct 3D RGB-T models for human and adversarial clothing. NORP is a new adversarial pattern design using distinct visible and thermal materials without overlap, avoiding the light reduction in overlapping RGB-T patterns (ORP). To optimize the NORP on adversarial clothing, we propose a spatial discrete-continuous optimization (SDCO) method. We systematically evaluated our method on RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures, demonstrating high attack success rates both in the digital and physical worlds. Additionally, we introduce a fusion-stage ensemble method that enhances the transferability of adversarial attacks across unseen RGB-T detectors with different fusion architectures.

其他 1 篇

Evaluation Cards for XAI Metrics

Medium 2605.04410
Rokas Gipiškis, Olga Kurasova
arXiv PDF cs.CV
TL;DR：提出 XAI 评估卡模板，规范可解释 AI 评估指标的文档化报告。
🎯研究动机

可解释 AI 评估缺乏标准化，指标定义不一致、报告不完整、缺乏基线验证，导致评估碎片化。

❓解决问题

XAI 评估指标的报告透明性不足，缺乏统一的文档规范。

🔎现象分析

摘要未提供具体实验现象。

🛠️主要方法

提出 XAI 评估卡，一种文档模板，要求明确声明目标属性、基础水平、指标假设、验证证据、博弈风险和已知失败案例。

📊实验结果

摘要未提供具体实验结果。

⭐主要贡献
  • 识别出评估报告透明性是 XAI 评估中未被充分解决的核心问题。
  • 提出 XAI 评估卡模板，作为社区规范以减少评估碎片化、支持元分析并提高问责性。
⚠️方法局限
  • 模板的有效性需要社区采纳和实证验证。
  • 可能增加报告负担，需要平衡详尽性与实用性。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

The evaluation of explainable AI (XAI) methods is affected by a lack of standardization. Metrics are inconsistently defined, incompletely reported, and rarely validated against common baselines. In this paper, we identify transparency of evaluation reporting as a central, under-addressed problem. We propose the XAI Evaluation Card, a documentation template analogous to model cards, designed to accompany any study that introduces an XAI evaluation metric. The card covers explicit declaration of target properties, grounding levels, metric assumptions, validation evidence, gaming risks, and known failure cases. We argue that adopting this template as a community norm would reduce evaluation fragmentation, support meta-analysis, and improve accountability in XAI research.

越狱与攻击 1 篇

Sparse Tokens Suffice: Jailbreaking Audio Language Models via Token-Aware Gradient Optimization

High 2605.04700
Zheng Fang, Xiaosen Wang, Shenyi Zhang, Shaokang Wang, Zhijin Ge
arXiv PDF cs.CR
TL;DR：音频语言模型越狱攻击中，密集波形更新冗余，仅需稀疏令牌级梯度即可保持高攻击成功率。
🎯研究动机

现有音频语言模型越狱攻击通常对整个波形进行密集优化，计算成本高且可能引入不必要噪声，但梯度在音频令牌间分布不均匀的观察表明稀疏优化可行。

❓解决问题

如何利用令牌级梯度结构实现高效的稀疏越狱攻击，减少冗余波形更新。

🔎现象分析

发现令牌对齐的梯度能量在音频令牌间高度非均匀，仅少数令牌主导优化信号，密集更新冗余。

🛠️主要方法

提出令牌感知梯度优化（TAGO），在每次迭代中仅保留高梯度能量令牌对应的波形梯度，其余梯度置零，实现稀疏优化。

📊实验结果

在三个音频语言模型上评估，Qwen3-Omni 上令牌保留率 0.25 时 ASR_l 为 86%（全令牌 87%），表明稀疏优化有效。

⭐主要贡献
  • 揭示音频语言模型中令牌对齐梯度的非均匀结构，证明密集波形更新冗余。
  • 提出 TAGO 方法，通过稀疏令牌级梯度优化实现高效越狱攻击，在三个 ALM 上保持高攻击成功率。
⚠️方法局限
  • 仅验证了越狱攻击场景，未探索对安全对齐训练的潜在影响。
  • 梯度能量阈值选择可能依赖模型，需进一步自动化。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Jailbreak attacks on audio language models (ALMs) optimize audio perturbations to elicit unsafe generations, and they typically update the entire waveform densely throughout optimization. In this work, we investigate the necessity of such dense optimization by analyzing the structure of token-aligned gradients in ALMs. We find that gradient energy is highly non-uniform across audio tokens, indicating that only a small subset of token-aligned audio regions dominates the optimization signal. Motivated by this observation, we propose Token-Aware Gradient Optimization (TAGO), which enables sparse jailbreak optimization by retaining only waveform gradients aligned with audio tokens that have high gradient energy, while masking the remaining gradients at each iteration. Across three ALMs, TAGO outperforms baselines, and substantial sparsification preserves strong attack success rates (e.g. on Qwen3-Omni, $\mathrm{ASR}_{l}$ remains at 86% with a token retention ratio of 0.25, compared to 87% with full token retention). These results demonstrate that dense waveform updates are largely redundant, and we advocate that future audio jailbreak and safety alignment research should further leverage this heterogeneous token-level gradient structure.

基础/前沿模型 (含LLM) 33 篇 · 7 个细分

模型架构 9 篇

Critical Windows of Complexity Control: When Transformers Decide to Reason or Memorize

High 2605.04396
Sarwan Ali
arXiv PDF cs.LG
TL;DR：Transformer 的推理与记忆行为由训练中一个尖锐的关键窗口决定，窗口内施加权重衰减对泛化至关重要。
🎯研究动机

现有研究将复杂度控制视为静态超参数，忽略了训练过程中何时施加控制最为关键，理解这一时间窗口有助于更高效地训练泛化模型。

❓解决问题

确定 Transformer 在训练过程中决定其走向推理还是记忆的关键时间窗口，并分析其特性。

🔎现象分析

在组合任务上，权重衰减仅在训练中期的一个尖锐窗口内有效，窗口偏移少量步数即可导致 OOD 准确率从随机水平跃升至推理水平；窗口位置依赖于初始化尺度，且小初始化下推理解的吸引域反而缩小，与常见建议相悖；该现象在模算术任务上不出现。

🛠️主要方法

通过控制权重衰减的施加时间窗口，在组合任务上进行实验，分析不同窗口位置、长度和初始化尺度对 OOD 准确率的影响。

📊实验结果

在受控的组合任务和模算术任务上进行实验，报告了 OOD 准确率等指标，并进行了窗口位置、长度和初始化尺度的系统分析。

⭐主要贡献
  • 发现 Transformer 的推理与记忆命运由训练中一个尖锐的关键窗口决定，窗口内施加权重衰减即可达到全训练衰减的效果。
  • 揭示了关键窗口的位置依赖于初始化尺度，且小初始化下推理解的吸引域缩小，挑战了“小初始化更好”的普遍观点。
  • 证明关键窗口现象具有任务特异性，在模算术任务上不出现。
⚠️方法局限
  • 实验仅限于合成任务，真实场景下的适用性未知。
  • 未提供理论解释为何窗口如此尖锐。
查看完整摘要 (Abstract)

Recent work has shown that Transformers' compositional generalization is governed by \emph{complexity control}, initialization scale and weight decay, which steers training toward low-complexity reasoning solutions rather than high-complexity memorization. Existing analyses, however, treat complexity control as a single static hyperparameter choice, leaving open \emph{when} during training this control is actually decisive. We show that the memorization-versus-reasoning fate of a Transformer is determined within a sharp, identifiable window of training.
